name: Gilmore Avenue Car Wash & Lube
description:
Gilmore Avenue Car Wash & Quick Lube, located at 602 Clarks Ln. in Winona, MN, has been serving the community since 1992 as a one-stop automotive cleaning and maintenance facility. The business offers two primary exterior wash options: a staff-attended Soft Cloth wash (open Monday-Saturday, 8am-6pm) and an automated Touchless wash available 24/7. name: Waretown Car Wash
description:
Magic Wash, located in the Manahawkin, New Jersey area (serving LBI & Mainland), has been providing vehicle care services since 1983. The facility features a state-of-the-art express carwash with automated ride-thru technology using EXPRESS PAY TECHNOLOGY—claimed as the first carwash in New Jersey to offer this format. Customers can complete a wash in approximately 5 minutes with no lines or wait times. The wash includes a spot-free rinse system that eliminates the need for hand drying. Given the Jersey Shore location with salt air, the business emphasizes weekly washing to prevent rust damage.

In addition to express carwashing, Magic Wash offers RED CARPET SERVICE, a personalized interior detailing package that includes full interior vacuuming, interior window cleaning, interior dusting, and spray air freshener application. The facility also provides custom detailing services, self-service carwash bays, a laundromat, dog wash station, and specialty services. An unlimited wash club membership is available for regular customers. The business operates Monday through Sunday, 8 AM to 5 PM for express carwash services, with full-service interior hours running 9 AM to 4 PM weekdays and 8:30 AM to 4 PM on Saturdays. Magic Wash is a proud member of industry associations and utilizes water recycling technology in its operations.

name: Tremont Wash & Lube
description:
Tremont Wash & Lube is a car wash facility located in the Bronx, New York at 1095 E Tremont Ave. They operate 24 hours and offer multiple wash service options including an express exterior automatic soft touch wash equipped with advanced sensing technology to contour and gently cleanse vehicles, as well as multiple self-serve wash bays for customers who prefer to wash their vehicles themselves. The facility uses quality soap and wax products and provides additional amenities including on-site vacuums and vending machines.

The business offers two primary monthly wash club membership tiers: the Ceramic Shine Full Service Wash Club at $59.99 per month (includes Citrus Lava Bath, Ceramic Shine, Extreme Protection, and vacuum service with 1 wash per day), and the Ceramic Shine Exterior Wash Club at $34.99 per month (includes the same treatments minus vacuum service). Both packages provide daily access with tax not included. Additional services include fleet account programs for companies with multiple vehicles and a referral bonus program where customers earn $2.00 when a referred friend downloads the app and makes a purchase.

Tremont Wash & Lube has developed a mobile app (coming soon to iOS and Android) that allows customers to pay for washes, earn loyalty points, send eGifts, participate in a game for prize eligibility, and access exclusive mobile-only offers. Customers can contact the facility at 718-828-9300 or info@tremontcarwashandlube.com for more information.

name: Dolly's Columbia Carwash
description: Dolly's Columbia Carwash on Berger Road in Columbia, MD operates two touchless automated wash bays open 24/7, with three pricing tiers—the Ultimate Wash at $15, Deluxe Wash at $13, and Basic Wash at $11. The facility includes eight self-service wash bays where cash payments start at $3 for 72 seconds, while credit card minimums begin at $6 for 384 seconds. name: Our Town Auto Wash
description:
# Our Town Auto Wash, Fairborn, OH

Our Town Auto Wash at 821 N Broad St in Fairborn operates 24/7 with a touchless automated system and self-serve bays, earning a 4.6-star rating across 110 customer reviews. The facility accommodates dually pickup trucks and oversized vehicles without conveyor tracks, making it accessible for vehicles that don't fit standard tunnel washes. Three touchless wash configurations priced from $10 to $16 serve different cleaning needs, while the Platinum Wash—Key to the City package adds ceramic protectant, rainbow polish, and tire dressing for maximum protection.

Membership options range from $22 to $35 monthly across Platinum Unlimited, Gold Unlimited, Bronze Unlimited, and Touchless Unlimited tiers, all managed through an app. The Gold Wash—Mayor's Special includes undercarriage cleaning and triple foam polish at a mid-tier price point, while the Bronze Wash—Broad Street Sparkle offers the fastest basic option. Free vacuums accompany every wash, and additional services include ceramic coating, mat cleaning, air freshener application, and tire shine.

For drivers with specialized vehicles, the self-serve bay option accommodates motorcycles, and family plans cover up to five vehicles on one membership. Our Town Auto Wash accepts credit cards, cash, mobile app payments, tap-to-pay, and payment kiosks. Visit during any of the 24 hours in a day—the business opens at the same time every day of the week—or manage your membership through their app-based system.

name: Dirks Car Wash Greentree
description: Dirks Car Wash Greentree operates 24 hours daily at 499 Mansfield Ave in Pittsburgh, offering both soft cloth automatic and touch-free bays for vehicles of any condition. The facility includes a self-service vacuum station and accepts credit, debit, and contactless payments. Single washes range from the Bronze at $12 to the Platinum at $22 (plus tax), while the unlimited wash club starts at $25 per month with automatic monthly billing. Customers who join the loyalty program on the kiosk with their phone number receive every 5th single wash free. The wash options include ceramic coating, tire shine, wax, and undercarriage wash services. The membership program supports multiple vehicle support through license plate camera verification, allowing up to 5 vehicles per account. With a 3.3-star rating across 172 reviews, Dirks Car Wash Greentree is part of a six-location Pittsburgh network. To start washing, visit the location at 499 Mansfield Ave anytime—the bays operate 24/7, and the kiosk is available whenever you arrive.

name: Quick Clean Car & Pet Wash Store, Ltd.
description:
Quick Clean Car & Pet Wash Store, Ltd. at 2500 Mayfair Rd in Akron, OH operates 24/7/365 and is the only location in the area offering both Touch Free and Soft Touch automatic wash technology under one roof. The Touch Free wash system accommodates vehicles up to 96 inches wide and 94 inches tall, with a No Touch power dryer system, while the Soft Touch option uses World Class equipment with closed cell foam media technology and includes wheel cleaning capability. During the Soft Touch wash, an LED light show runs through the bay.

Customers consistently report that the strong water pressure effectively removes dirt, and the brushless technology eliminates rim scratches that can occur with traditional brush systems. The undercarriage wash proves particularly valuable during winter months for removing salt buildup. Quick Clean also offers ArmorAll Extreme Shine Wax and Rain-X Complete Surface Protectant as finishing options, plus free vacuums and tire shine service. Self-serve wash bays give customers hands-on control, and self-serve pet wash stations are available for pet grooming needs.

The business maintains a Monthly Wash Club membership program and accepts mobile app payments for convenience. The location holds a 4.6-star rating across 281 customer reviews. For the car wash, call (330) 644-2140, or reach pet care services at (330) 819-5242. Hours remain consistent every day of the week at 24 hours of operation.

name: Salty Spray Car Wash
description: Salty Spray Car Wash in Port St Joe, FL operates a touchless drive-thru system available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, allowing drivers to wash their vehicles without leaving the car. The facility also maintains three self-serve bays open around the clock—two with covers and one uncovered bay designed for taller boats—making it one of the few locations in the area offering dedicated boat washing alongside standard car cleaning. With a 4.1-star rating from 134 customer reviews, Salty Spray distinguishes itself by serving both vehicle and marine owners from its location at 768 US-98. The combination of touchless automated washing and self-serve bay access means customers can choose between a quick hands-off wash or hands-on cleaning with equipment access. Reach Salty Spray at hello@saltyspraycarwash.com or visit the facility any time—it's staffed and operational 24 hours daily.

description: Foam And Wash in Poughkeepsie, NY operates the 24/7 Touchless Wash as a brushless automated option open every day of the week. The location at 369 Noxon Rd also runs a 24/7 Self Serve bay and 24/7 Dog Wash station for customers who prefer to wash their own vehicles or clean their pets. Beyond the main wash services, Foam And Wash offers ceramic coating, undercarriage wash, tire shine, wheel cleaner, and wax applications. Membership through the Go Unlimited plan provides wash as often as you want for one low price, and members can manage their account through the online membership portal. The business also stocks a free vacuum and operates a Shell Express fuel station at this Poughkeepsie location. With a 4.2-star rating from 203 customer reviews, Foam And Wash serves customers around the clock. Call or visit 369 Noxon Rd during any hour to access the 24/7 Touchless Wash, or enroll in Go Unlimited through the membership portal at foamandwash.com.

name: Wash Me Autowash
description: Wash Me Autowash in Greenville, SC operates a touchless automated car wash alongside self-serve wash bays, open 24 hours daily at 1133 E Butler Rd. The facility offers three distinct wash options: Touch Free Wash, Soft Touch Wash, and Self Serve Wash Bays, with free vacuums included when using the automatic wash services. Customer reviews consistently highlight the quality of the vacuums, which one patron noted are "never under power," and the effectiveness of the soft touch wash option. The business has maintained a 4.2-star rating across 230 customer reviews, with feedback emphasizing that it offers "excellent value with more to offer than newer competitors." The interior cleaning vacuums are specifically available for customers handling their own wash work, supporting those who prefer hands-on car cleaning. For drivers seeking either a fully automated wash or the control of a self-serve bay, the location provides both options within the same facility. Call 864-288-2260 to learn more about specific services, or visit during any hour—the wash is accessible around the clock, seven days a week.

name: Clean Works Car Wash
description:
# Clean Works Car Wash, Waukee, IA

Clean Works Car Wash operates a touchless automated wash system at 440 W Hickman Rd in Waukee, with access 24 hours every day of the week. The facility includes both automatic wash bays and self-serve bays, along with car vacuums for customers to use after washing. The business accepts mobile pay options including credit cards and PayPal, making payment flexible whether you're using the automatic system or self-serve equipment.

The VIP Wash Card program offers discounted rates on washes, with package options ranging from $23 for a $25 value up to $287 for a $350 value. This card works in both the automatic and self-serve bays at the Waukee location. With a 3.8-star rating across 160 customer reviews, the facility represents one option in the Brelsford Properties network of Iowa car washes. Contact the business at 515-490-2163 or visit during the hours listed above to sign up for the VIP program or use the facility.

Free vacuums and vending machines are available on-site, along with air freshener. The business offers four wash packages, with the top three including dry service, and new app users receive $10 in free credit. With a 4.5-star rating across 121 customer reviews, Lutz's positions itself around touchless washing combined with self-service flexibility; the South Park location adds four self-serve bays for customers who prefer manual control. Visit during the 24-hour operating hours, or download the app to start with $10 free credit toward your first wash.

name: Squit the Dirt
description:
Squit the Dirt in Leesburg, Florida operates as a touchless, self-service car wash open 24 hours daily at 32313 CR-473. The facility provides multiple self-serve bays equipped with professional-grade pressure washers, allowing customers to control wash intensity and duration. Beyond basic washing, Squit the Dirt offers a foam applicator, spot-free rinse, tire cleaner, wax application, and a vacuum system for interior cleaning, giving users customizable solutions tailored to individual vehicle needs.

The touchless design eliminates brush contact, addressing concerns about paint damage during automated washing. Multiple pressure washer units and vacuum systems mean shorter wait times during peak hours. Customer feedback consistently highlights the variety of cleaning options available—particularly the tire cleaner and wax application—alongside the effectiveness of the spot-free rinse and the well-maintained condition of the bays themselves. One reviewer noted the pressure from the hoses was calibrated appropriately, neither excessive nor insufficient for thorough cleaning.

With a 3.4-star rating across 137 reviews, Squit the Dirt attracts owners seeking control over their vehicle maintenance process rather than a fully automated experience. The 24-hour availability accommodates various schedules without requiring advance planning. For more information or to inquire about specific services, call +1 352-343-4293 or visit the facility during your preferred time.

name: JH Car Wash Pekin
description: JH Car Wash Pekin operates a touchless automated wash at 3405 Court St with 24/7 access to self-service bays, making it available any time you need a wash. Beyond the automated touchless system, JH Car Wash Pekin features self-serve wash bays open around the clock, plus rainbow soap and LED lights as part of the wash experience. The facility maintains a 4.0-star rating across 103 customer reviews. Call 309-266-5011 or visit during the 24/7 operating hours at the Pekin location.

The family-owned business offers memberships starting at $24.99/month, with free vacuums included for members and family plans that deliver 25% savings across multiple vehicles. Members can also take advantage of air freshener and towels during their visits. Beyond the wash bay, the facility provides a savings calculator on its website so customers can determine which membership tier makes financial sense for their washing frequency. With a 4.5-star rating across 329 customer reviews, North Andover Car Wash accepts mobile pay for seamless transactions. name: Wash Werkz
description: Wash Werkz in Indiana, PA operates a touchless automated car wash system available 24 hours daily across all seven days of the week. The facility features 24/7 self-serve bays alongside its automatic wash line, which customers can monitor in real time using the business's live-streamed wait time webcam before arriving. Beyond vehicle washing, Wash Werkz offers a dedicated dog wash service and operates a membership program with an unlimited wash club option. The business also provides Business Fleet Systems for commercial customers. With a 4.2-star rating from 168 customer reviews, Wash Werkz markets itself as locally owned and operated. Visit the location at 2268 Oakland Ave, Indiana, PA 15701 during any hour, or check the live automatic carwash line view on their website to see current wait times before you go.

name: Firehouse Self-Service Touchless Car Wash
description:
Firehouse Self-Service Touchless Car Wash in Browns Mills, NJ offers brushless, automated cleaning for drivers who want a gentle wash without the risk of scratches or swirl marks. Located at 100 Firehouse Rd, this self-service facility uses touchless technology to safely clean your vehicle's exterior while you maintain control of the process. The wash bay is equipped with a car vacuum station, making it convenient to clean your interior at the same time.

With a 3.4-star rating from 119 customer reviews, Firehouse Self-Service Touchless Car Wash provides an affordable option for vehicle maintenance in Browns Mills. Whether you're looking for a quick rinse or a more thorough wash, the self-service setup lets you choose your wash time and pressure settings to suit your car's needs.

name: Water Works Car Wash- Elkridge
description:
Water Works Car Wash in Elkridge operates on Old Washington Road with a 4.3-star rating across 559 customer reviews, and maintains 24-hour access to self-serve bays every day of the week. The facility offers both a touchless laser wash and soft cloth wash option, with customers specifically noting the appeal of the touch-free laser service being available around the clock. Beyond the automated lanes, Water Works includes undercarriage spray, foam polish, wax sealant, spot-free rinse, and touchfree air drying, plus dedicated wheel and tire cleaning.

Monthly club memberships are available for regular visitors, and the business partners with K&G Auto Detailing for more comprehensive work. One long-term customer reported using the facility for 15 years and consistently found it open and clean. Water Works accepts credit cards, debit cards, and contactless payments. Call 410.796.7948 or visit the Elkridge location at 6370 Old Washington Road, MD 21075 anytime—the self-serve bays operate 24 hours daily.

name: Dribbles Car Wash
description:
Dribbles Car Wash in Manteca has operated as a family-owned business for 25 years, running a touchless express wash system that operates 24 hours a day, 365 days a year at 780 N Main St. The facility includes six self-serve bays where customers can handle their own washing, eight vacuums for interior cleanup, and carpet shampoo service for floor mats and upholstery. With a 3.8-star rating across 304 customer reviews, the business accepts mobile pay for added convenience.

Beyond the automated express option, the self-serve bays give customers direct control over their wash process. The eight available vacuums mean you won't compete for cleaning equipment, and the carpet shampoo service addresses interior detailing that many facilities skip. Because Dribbles Car Wash never closes—not on weekends, holidays, or weeknights—you can pull in whenever your schedule allows.

Call 209-823-0446 to ask about specific service pricing, or simply arrive at 780 N Main St in Manteca whenever it's convenient; the wash is operational around the clock.

name: Pit Stop Touch Free Car Wash
description:
Pit Stop Touch Free Car Wash in Milwaukee operates a brushless automated wash system that uses no brushes or contact with your vehicle's surface. Located at 2021 West Silver Spring Drive, the facility has earned a 4.4-star rating across 288 customer reviews, with customers specifically noting it as "one of the more quality touch washes in the Milwaukee area." The business offers both touch-free automated wash and self-serve wash bays, plus amenities including free vacuums and a mobile app for purchasing and tracking washes. An unlimited wash plan is available through the app, which also provides access to a loyalty rewards program where you can earn free washes and send gift wash cards to others.

Pit Stop has operated since 1998 and accepts credit and debit card payments at its location open daily from 6:00 AM to 9:00 PM. Reviewers highlight the reasonably priced basic and deluxe packages, which include underbody flush—useful for Milwaukee winters when salt removal is a priority. The facility also operates secure self-storage units on-site. To learn about current pricing or schedule a visit, call 414-354-9619 during operating hours.

name: Clean Getaway Auto Wash
description: Clean Getaway Auto Wash in Dickson, TN operates 24 hours every day of the week at 117 Henslee Dr, offering touchless automated wash bays alongside self-serve options. The location includes free vacuums, air stations, self-prep areas, and vending machines for vehicle care products. As a touchless car wash, the equipment avoids direct contact with your vehicle's surface. This Dickson location is one of 13 throughout Middle Tennessee operated by Clean Getaway, with premium stand-alone sites offering a wider range of services and convenience store locations at local fueling stations providing more economical options. The business holds a 4.1-star rating across 210 customer reviews. Since the Dickson wash operates around the clock, you can access touch-free automatics, self-serve bays, and covered vacuums at any hour that works for your schedule.

name: Salty Dog Car Wash - DeBary
description:
Salty Dog Car Wash in DeBary operates a touchless automated wash system equipped with latest sensing technology that contours to your vehicle's shape during the wash cycle. The location at 101 S Charles Richard Beall Blvd is open 24 hours every day of the week, with self-serve bays featuring high-pressure washing equipment available whenever you need them. The business offers ceramic coating and wax services, plus high-powered vacuums and a car care vending machine stocked with Armor All products for additional detailing work.

Members can join the Wash Club through the mobile app to earn loyalty points, receive exclusive offers, and play the Salty Dog Saga game for chances to win prizes. The app also lets you purchase individual washes, send gift cards, and access mobile detailing services. Salty Dog Car Wash operates as the preferred car wash for Volusia County and delivers what they call the "Signature Salty Dog Shine" using their selected soap and wax formula.

With a current rating of 2.6 stars from 262 customer reviews, the business accepts mobile payment and gift cards through its app. To experience the wash, download the Salty Dog Car Wash app on iOS or Android, or visit the DeBary location during any hour since it operates 24/7.

name: Bear Express Car Wash
description: Bear Express Car Wash in Bear, DE operates a touchless automated system that completes washes in 3 minutes, with a 4.2-star rating across 947 customer reviews. The Unlimited VIP Wash Club Membership at $19.99/month allows daily washing with no contract—you can cancel anytime and pay only when you use it. Every wash includes free vacuums, Bear Mascot Air Fresheners, complimentary window cleaner, and access to Bear Microfiber Towels onsite, plus mat holders for cleaning floor mats. The location at 1714 Pulaski Hwy offers self-service wash bays alongside the automated touch-free option, and includes undercarriage cleaning as part of service. The facility has a restroom available and typically takes 15 minutes total per visit. Bear Express accepts credit cards, gift cards, and provides a membership management portal for account updates. The Bear location operates Monday through Saturday from 7AM to 9PM and Sunday from 7AM to 8PM. Call 302-365-5421 to ask about current wash packages or membership details.

name: Kirkland Premier Car wash
description: Kirkland Premier Car Wash in Washougal, WA operates a touchless, brushless automated system using an advanced 2-step presoak process that runs 24 hours daily, seven days a week. The facility offers three distinct wash tiers: the Deluxe Wash for basic dirt and road film removal, the Ultimate Wash which adds sealers and coatings for extended durability, and the Premier Wash as the full-service option with all available treatments. Beyond the automated wash, customers can access self-serve bays for brushless washing, touchless air dry, car vacuums, ceramic coating, tire shine, undercarriage wash, and wax applications. Bundle discounts are available when combining any wash packages together. The business operates self-serve brushless bays, a feature the site describes as unique across the Pacific Northwest. Currently rated 2.9 stars from 158 customer reviews, Kirkland Premier Car Wash is located at 510 C St, Washougal, WA 98671. To use the facility, visit during any hour since the location maintains round-the-clock access.

name: Circle K Touch Free Car Wash
description:
Circle K Touch Free Car Wash in Diamondhead, MS offers convenient 24/7 automated car washing with touchless technology that protects your vehicle's paint from brushes and bristles. Located at 39525, this self-service facility uses mobile pay options for quick, hassle-free transactions any time of day or night. Whether you need a quick rinse before work or a late-night wash, the round-the-clock availability makes it easy to fit car maintenance into your schedule.

The touchless brushless system at Circle K ensures a gentle clean without the risk of swirl marks or scratches that traditional brush washes can cause. With consistent availability seven days a week, Diamondhead residents and visitors can keep their vehicles clean on their own terms.

name: Super Suds Car & Dog Wash
description:
Super Suds Car & Dog Wash is a newly opened facility in Colorado Springs located at Woodmen Road and Black Forest Road, next to Good 2 Go. The business operates with 24/7 automatic car wash service and dog wash service from 7am to 10pm daily. The car wash offers multiple options including 3 automatic wash bays with both touch-free and soft cloth technology packages, 3 self-serve bays with free vacuuming via the UWASH app, 6 self-serve vacuum and detail bays with complimentary microfiber towels and spray bottles, and a mat washing station. The facility accommodates oversized vehicles including dually trucks and RVs.

The dog wash service utilizes iClean Dog Wash touch screen technology with animated TV instructions for quick 10-minute wash cycles. Features include 2 handicap accessible stations, high-quality pet shampoo and conditioner, a fleawash option, 2-speed blow dry, free tub disinfectant before each wash, and complimentary dash wipes for vehicles. All dog wash amenities include safety leashes, towels, and aprons, though towels are not provided after 7:00 pm due to theft concerns.

Super Suds offers a membership program called the Sudsy Savings Club for additional discounts and savings on both car and dog wash services. Customer reviews praise the facility's staff helpfulness, convenient equipment setup, fair pricing, and quality of service, with particular commendation for the touchless wash quality and the unique convenience of washing both vehicle and pet at one location.

name: Scrubby's Car Washes
description:
Scrubby's Car Wash operates two locations in Bozeman, Montana and has been voted Gallatin's Greatest Car Wash for 4 years in a row. The Touch Free Tunnel location at 1303 N 7th Ave offers an automated touchless express wash and is open Monday-Saturday 8am-6pm and Sunday 9am-5pm. The second location at 1193 N 15th Ave features a combination of services including 4 self-serve bays, a soft touch automatic wash with heated water and floors, and the Scrub Spaw dog wash facility.

The Scrub Spaw is a unique amenity offering pet washing services in a heated room, equipped with dog shampoo, flea and tick treatments, and an air dryer. This location operates year-round at extended hours, open 24/7 during winter and 6am-9pm during other seasons. Both locations provide customer contact forms and phone lines for inquiries, with the self-serve location available at 406.582.9274 and the touch-free tunnel at 406.586.6541.

name: The Works Touchless Car Wash
description:
The Works Touchless Car Wash in Brewerton, NY offers brushless automated washing that protects your vehicle's paint while delivering a thorough clean. Located at 9609 Brewerton Rd, this touchless car wash uses advanced spray technology to remove dirt and grime without the wear and tear of traditional brushes. With a 3.6-star rating from 87 customer reviews, The Works has established itself as a reliable choice for Brewerton-area drivers seeking quality car care.

The facility combines automated touchless technology with self-service bay options, giving you flexibility depending on your needs and preferences. Whether you prefer the convenience of the automated system or want hands-on control at a self-service station, The Works accommodates both approaches. The touchless method is particularly valued by owners of newer vehicles or those with premium finishes looking to maintain their car's appearance long-term.

name: Hurricane Bay Touchfree Auto Wash
description:

Their brushless technology cleans your vehicle without making contact, helping protect your paint from scratches and swirl marks. The facility provides a convenient option for drivers in the Clinton area looking for a quick, hands-off wash experience.

The business operates as a self-service touchless wash station, allowing you to control the cleaning process at your own pace. Whether you need a standard wash or prefer additional services, Hurricane Bay aims to make vehicle maintenance accessible and straightforward for local customers.

The facility also offers truck wash, camper wash, and bike wash services, along with gift cards available in formats like Great Stocking Stuffer, Employee Appreciation, Party Favors, and Gift Grab Bags. Call ahead or visit during staffed hours to set up your membership.

Beyond the wash bays, Classic Carwash South provides interior cleaning with vacuums, shampoo machines, and spot-removing equipment, plus free vacuums and mat cleaning for customers who prefer to handle interior work themselves.

The business won the award for favorite carwash in Kansas and accommodates vehicles of all sizes, including RVs, trailers, and oversized vehicles in its self-serve bays. The Unlimited Rewards membership program delivers 20% cash back on gift card reloads, which can be applied toward automatic washes, self-serve bays, or vacuum services. Additional services include a Fleet Wash Program and fundraising options for organizations. With a 4.1-star rating across 314 customer reviews, the location is one of two Classic Carwash locations in Leavenworth. name: Kirkland Premier Car Wash
description:
Kirkland Premier Car Wash in Vancouver, WA operates as "The Pacific Northwest's Premier Self-Serve Brushless Car Wash," offering touchless technology at its location on NE 121st Ave. The facility features self-serve bays equipped with brushless systems and touchless air dry, along with undercarriage wash, ceramic coating, wax, and tire shine services. Three wash packages are available: the Deluxe Wash targets quick cleaning of dirt and grime, the Ultimate Wash adds sealers and coatings for durability, and the Premier Wash provides the top-tier package with all available services. Bundle discounts allow customers to combine any wash packages at reduced prices across multiple locations expanding throughout the Pacific Northwest.

The Vancouver location maintains 24/7 access on Wednesday, accommodating customers who need flexibility outside standard business hours. The brushless system avoids the contact that can mark paint, while the touchless air dry completes the process without hand towels or compressed air gaps that risk spotting. Bundle discounts at each location mean cost savings for customers who choose multiple services. Contact the business directly at its Vancouver address (6106 NE 121st Ave) to confirm current hours for other days of the week or to learn about additional service details.

name: Woodstock Carwash
description:
Woodstock Carwash in Woodstock, VA operates a touchless automated system at 1155 Henry Ford Dr, open 24 hours daily across all seven days. The facility offers four distinct wash packages: the DELUXE at $10 includes foam bath and spot-free rinse, the ULTIMATE at $13 adds triple foam polish and undercarriage cleaning, THE WORKS at $16 combines those with carnauba wax and ceramic shield, and THE WORKS PLUS at $18 includes professional tire shine application. Beyond the tunnel wash, Woodstock Carwash provides multiple self-serve bays with air dryers available 24/7, plus free central vacuums and vacuum islands at the same hours with QR code member access. Hand towels are supplied by the vacuum stations to prevent water spots. The lot accommodates oversized vehicles and RVs, with ample parking space and minimal wait times across multiple self-serve stalls. The facility uses environmentally friendly detergents and water-reclamation systems, accepting payment via major credit cards, debit, cash, and the EverWash mobile app. With a 4.2-star rating from 199 customer reviews, the business serves both express tunnel customers during 8am–8pm hours and those preferring self-service options. Visit at 1155 Henry Ford Dr any time, day or night, to access the express tunnel during daytime hours or the touchless wash and self-serve bays around the clock.

name: Elephant Car Wash
description:
Elephant Car Wash in Covington, WA operates as a touchless, brushless automated facility open 24 hours every day of the week at 27240 168th Pl SE. The business uses high-pressure water systems and specially formulated detergents to clean vehicles without brush contact, and applies wax and sealant treatments as specialty options. Beyond the automated tunnel, Elephant Car Wash offers Express Wash and Self-Serve options, with free vacuums available for customer use.

The Covington location accepts Visa and Mastercard for single washes and supports automatic billing for its membership program, which includes monthly plans, annual plans, and a family plan option. An unlimited wash club membership is available for customers seeking regular service. Elephant Car Wash has operated for 75 years and uses LPR and RFID readers to process memberships and payments efficiently. The business maintains eco-friendly operations across its locations.

With a 3.3-star rating based on 680 customer reviews, Elephant Car Wash reflects mixed customer experiences at this established regional chain. Visit the Covington location anytime since it's open 24/7, or call ahead to ask about membership options that fit your washing frequency.

name: Manosh Car Wash
description:
Manosh Car Wash in Morristown, VT is a touchless automated car wash facility operating 24 hours a day, year-round. Located at 548 Brooklyn St in the Morrisville Shopping Plaza, Manosh Car Wash is known throughout Northern Vermont as "the water experts" and has earned a 4.0-star rating from over 120 customer reviews. The facility features a Laser Wash autobay with automatic doors, plus three additional automatic bays and three self-serve bays to accommodate different washing preferences.

What sets Manosh Car Wash apart is its commitment to environmental responsibility and vehicle care. Using premium Simoniz brand products and pre-treated water that eliminates hard water and corrosive compounds, the car wash protects your vehicle's finish while conserving resources. The facility's variable-frequency drive motors and efficient wash cycles reduce water and electricity usage compared to driveway washing. All wash-water is properly managed to prevent chemical runoff into storm drains. The business accepts Visa, Mastercard, Discover, and Diner's Club.

Manosh Car Wash also offers convenient amenities including free vacuum service and a mat cleaner. Seasonal shampoo units operate during spring and summer months. Whether you need a quick automated wash or prefer a self-serve option, Manosh Car Wash provides a professional car washing experience built on expertise and environmental stewardship.

name: Soapy Bucket Car Wash
description:
Soapy Bucket Car Wash operates two locations in Howell, Michigan: one on Grand River Avenue (across from Planet Fitness) and a newer location on Lawson Drive (in front of the Howell Secretary of State). Both locations are open 24/7 and feature a combination of full-service automated bays and four self-serve bays. The primary wash system uses a specialized in-bay soft cloth approach with a five-brush system, beginning with a two-step pre-soak process that combines high-pH detergent to break down road grime followed by a low-pH solution to enhance shine.

The facility offers multiple wash packages ranging from Express to Ultimate tiers, with premium features including rain-x application, polish, spot-free rinse, high-velocity dry, chrome and glass cleaner, and tire and wheel wash service. A distinctive feature is their use of pure reverse osmosis water rather than reclaimed water, which the company claims provides a streak-free shine without impurities. The facility is well-lit and designed for efficiency.

Soapy Bucket incentivizes customer loyalty through their Wash Club membership program offering unlimited monthly washes for one flat fee, accessible via their mobile app or on-site kiosk. They also offer a buy-4-get-1-free promotion and birthday wash rewards through the app. The Soapy App integrates AirPay technology for quick payment processing and serves as the primary platform for managing memberships and accessing deals.

The facility offers four wash packages: the Express ($8) for quick exterior maintenance, the Basic ($10) that includes undercarriage cleaning to remove road salt and debris, the Better ($15) with wax coating for extra shine, and the Best ($20) featuring wax, tire shine, and spot-free rinse. Beyond the automatic wash bays, Caribbean Auto Spa provides self-serve vacuum stations and towels for finishing touches, plus a mobile app for payment convenience.

The business operates a membership program called Wash Clubs under the tagline "Wash More, Pay Less," designed for customers who wash frequently. With a 4.5-star rating from 186 reviews, Caribbean Auto Spa at 503 S Heritage Dr stays open around the clock every day of the week. To learn more about membership options or schedule your visit, call or text 574-312-3670.

The facility provides three service types: an Automatic Car Wash with high-pressure touchless jets that remove dirt without brushes or contact, a Self Serve Car Wash with soap, wax, clear coat, and pre-soak options, and a dog wash service. With a 3.9-star rating across 23 customer reviews, the business combines automated washing with self-serve bays for customers who prefer more control over the cleaning process. Call (319) 509-6551 to ask about specific pricing or visit anytime—the location never closes.

name: Snappy Car Wash LLC
description:
Snappy Car Wash LLC in Ladysmith, WI offers touchless, brushless automated washing technology that delivers superior cleaning results without brushes or abrasive contact. Located at 308 W 9th St N, this locally owned car wash is open 24/7 for your convenience. Customers consistently praise the spotless results, with many noting the wash quality exceeds competitors. The facility features self-serve bays, tire shine, ceramic coating, undercarriage wash, and wax options to customize your vehicle's cleaning and protection.

The Ladysmith location provides flexible membership plans starting with the Basic Wash Club at $22.99 monthly (first month $17.25), progressing through Deluxe, Premium, and Ultimate tiers up to $34.99 monthly. The Ultimate Wash Club includes premium treatments like Ceramic Seal, Rain-X Graphene, and Carnauba wax. All individual wash packages are currently $1 off when purchased through the app, and members earn points toward free washes with referrals and birthday specials. With a 4.5-star rating from 16 customer reviews, Snappy Car Wash demonstrates a strong commitment to quality service and customer satisfaction in Ladysmith.

The facility provides an impressive array of amenities beyond basic washing, including free vacuum service, ceramic coating, wax application, undercarriage wash, and tire shine options. The business operates extended hours seven days a week, opening at 7:30 AM on weekdays and 8 AM on weekends, with consistent 6 PM closing times daily, making it accessible before or after work and weekend errands.

name: MegaWash
description:
MegaWash in Ashland, VA offers touchless, brushless automated washing that keeps your vehicle's paint safe and spotless. Located at 10500 Vermeer Pl, this 24-hour car wash provides multiple cleaning options including ceramic coating, undercarriage wash, and tire shine, plus free vacuuming with every visit. Mobile pay makes transactions seamless, and with round-the-clock availability seven days a week, you can stop by whenever it works for your schedule. MegaWash also offers a membership program designed to maximize savings for frequent visitors.

name: FW Express Car Wash
description:

The facility uses contactless entry technology paired with touchless wash equipment that avoids brushes entirely. All customers receive free vacuum use, and the location includes self-serve bays for those who prefer hands-on washing alongside the automatic options.

The business offers three monthly membership tiers through its unlimited wash club: the Independence Unlimited at $29.99/month, the All American Unlimited at $39.99/month, and the Freedom Unlimited at $49.99/month, each providing contactless access and the ability to manage subscriptions for multiple vehicles through an account management system. FW Express also provides corporate fleet services and detailing work, with educational video tutorials available for self-service bay users. The facility is well-lit with security cameras and accepts payment through its online shop and account portal.

Call 757-555-0147 or visit during the 24/7 hours at the Lynnhaven Parkway location to inquire about membership options or self-serve bay access.

name: Mr. Clean Car Wash
description:

name: Gilbert’s Car Wash
description:
Gilbert's Car Wash in Dickinson, TX operates a self-serve touchless wash facility with high-powered vacuums and high-pressure air dryers for interior and final drying. The facility uses undiluted high-quality wash soaps and hog hair foam brushes, with a water softening system that filters water for all applications including the outboard motor flush connections available on-site. Credit card readers at each bay provide payment flexibility, and the location is open 24 hours on Wednesdays. The new vacuums distinguish this facility from older self-serve operations, addressing the common wear on equipment at competitor locations. With a 4.5-star rating, Gilbert's Car Wash serves customers in Galveston and Victoria Counties who need professional-grade self-serve equipment without the premium of a full-service wash.

To use the facility, visit 3514 Lobit Dr, Dickinson, TX 77539 during the hours that work for your schedule—notably, the location is available around the clock on Wednesdays if you prefer washing in off-peak hours.

name: Purple Elephant Car Wash
description:
Purple Elephant Carwash is a car wash chain operating five locations across Connecticut, including Waterbury (Chase Ave and Meriden Rd), Middletown, Torrington, and Naugatuck. With over 20 years of experience, the business offers a range of services including basic complete washes, express detailing with meticulous interior cleaning from windshield to rims, and a unique Freebie Zone feature available at all five locations. All locations provide always-free vacuums and free towel dry service, along with DIY self-serve washing bays for customers who prefer a hands-on approach.

The company emphasizes savings through its unlimited wash programs and the JUMBO Pass membership plan, which the website claims pays for itself in less than two visits. Their marketing highlights quality, speed, and consistency with a "100% Clean Car Guarantee or Your Dirt Back" promise. The business caters to both commercial and individual customers, offering family plans to help customers save money on regular car wash services.

Customer testimonials highlight the professionalism of staff, fair pricing, quality results, and the damage-free nature of the machines. The business positions itself as the best value option in the area, with emphasis on customer experience captured in their brand phrase "Have an Elephantastic Day." Contact is available via email at purpleelephantcw@outlook.com or at individual locations.

name: Sam's Car Wash Self Serve - Manassas
description:
Sam's Car Wash is a family-owned and operated car wash business that has been serving the Washington Metropolitan Area since 1957, celebrating over 65 years in business. They operate multiple locations including Temple Hills MD, Frederick MD, Manassas VA, and Oxon Hill MD, offering both full-service and self-serve car wash options. The business features state-of-the-art equipment and technology, with complimentary vacuums available for all wash customers.

The company offers flexible monthly membership plans starting at as little as $24.99 per month through their Unlimited Car Wash program, allowing members to wash their cars daily. Services include standard car wash, waxing, and interior cleaning. Customers can purchase gift cards and join monthly wash clubs through their online stores, with separate platforms for Temple Hills and Frederick locations. Sam's also provides a Commercial Car Wash Fleet Program designed for businesses needing flexible, efficient fleet vehicle maintenance.

According to customer reviews on their website, Sam's is known for fast, efficient service with friendly staff and exceptional customer service. The business emphasizes thorough cleaning and long-lasting shine, with customers praising their ability to quickly serve multiple vehicles while maintaining quality. Contact information is available at their Temple Hills location (3401 Branch Avenue, Temple Hills MD, 301-894-3100) or via email at members@samscarwash.com.

name: Royal Wash House
description:
Royal Wash House at 1025 MN-7 in Hutchinson, MN operates a touchless car wash using industry-leading Laserwash equipment, meaning no brushes make contact with your vehicle during cleaning. The facility uses a 4.3-star rating across 194 customer reviews and runs daily from 7 AM to 9 PM, making it accessible seven days a week. Members can enroll in the Unlimited Car Wash Membership starting at $18, providing regular access without per-wash fees.

Beyond the car wash, Royal Wash House combines three services under one roof: large-capacity laundry equipment, lay-down tanning beds and stand-up tanning capsules with available tanning lotions, plus a self-service car wash option. The location includes free vacuums, on-site ATMs, and coin changers to support multiple payment methods including quarters, credit cards, and debit cards. To start a membership or learn more about current wash packages, visit during operating hours at 1025 MN-7, Hutchinson, MN 55350, or check the website for membership details.

name: Anytime Laserwash
description:
Anytime Laserwash in Biscoe, NC offers touchless, brushless automated washing that protects your vehicle's paint while delivering a thorough clean. Located at 2398 NC-24, the facility uses laser technology to safely remove dirt and grime without making contact with your car's surface—ideal if you want to avoid brush marks or swirl damage. With a 3.5-star rating from 89 customer reviews, Anytime Laserwash serves Biscoe and the surrounding area with convenient, reliable service.

The self-service model gives you flexibility to wash on your own schedule, making it a practical choice for busy car owners. Whether you need a quick rinse or a full wash, touchless technology works effectively on all vehicle types and finishes.

name: Camps Touch Free Car Wash
description:
Camps Touch Free Car Wash at 21 Charron Ave in Nashua, NH operates 24 hours daily and offers three distinct wash methods: the Typhoon TouchFree Car Wash for a no-contact clean, a Soft Cloth Tunnel Car Wash option, and Self Service Car Wash Bays for hands-on control. The facility includes free vacuums and coin laundry—Nashua's largest coin laundry operation—alongside auto detailing services. With a 4.1-star rating from 166 customer reviews, the business attracts regular customers through its Monthly Wash Pass and Camps Car Care Club membership tiers, both manageable online. The location accepts gift cards, pre-paid wash cards, and monthly passes as payment options, and applies a Ceramic Coat Vehicle Protectant as part of its service offerings.

The 24-hour availability makes Camps Touch Free Car Wash accessible regardless of schedule constraints. Customers can choose their preferred wash method based on preference—whether seeking the contactless approach of the Typhoon system or the brush-based softness of the tunnel wash. The self-service bays accommodate those who prefer to handle washing themselves, while the included vacuums support quick interior tidying. For frequent visitors, the Monthly Wash Pass eliminates trip-by-trip payments. Contact the location at 21 Charron Ave or visit during any hour, seven days a week.

name: Splash & Dash Car Wash
description:
Splash & Dash Car Wash is a locally-owned car wash in Manassas, VA, operating since 2007, located at 10266 Irongate Way near The Festival at Manassas shopping center. The business features one of the longest car wash tunnels in Manassas and offers a distinctive service model combining automated tunnel washing with personal touches: hand-prep before the tunnel and hand-dry after, ensuring a detailed clean. The facility operates Monday-Saturday 8am-7pm and Sunday 8am-6pm with no appointment needed.

The wash menu includes four express tunnel tiers: Clean & Dry ($14 single/$29.99/month unlimited), Xtreme Wheel ($17/$29.99/month), Wax & Shine ($22/$34.99/month), and Ceramic Shield ($27/$42.99/month). All packages feature dual presoaks, soft foam wash, spot-free rinse, power dry, hand prep, towel dry, free vacuums, tire shine, wheel cleaner, super bug foamer, undercarriage rinse, carnauba wax, rain repel, and clear coat protectant, with the premium tier adding ceramic coating. Full-service options add $15 and include interior vacuuming, window cleaning, and dash care. Add-on detailing services include Express Hand Wax ($75-$85) and Interior Super Clean ($75-$85).

The membership-based Unlimited Club offers significant value, allowing customers to wash daily for less than the price of two single washes with quick barcode sticker access, automatic monthly billing, and no contracts. The business emphasizes its experienced team, with most staff having 10+ years tenure, and provides complimentary amenities including unlimited vacuums, towels, window cleaner, and all-purpose cleaner with every wash.

name: Four Seasons Car Wash
description:
Four Seasons Car Washes is a locally owned and operated business serving the Miami Valley region of Ohio for over 20 years. They operate three convenient locations: Centerville (8311 Yankee Road, 937-433-3940), Moraine (5240 Cobblegate Drive, 937-643-9033), and Middletown (2160 South Breiel Boulevard, 513-424-9015). The company offers a combination of two tunnel wash locations and three self-serve bay locations to accommodate different customer preferences.

The business specializes in unlimited wash plans available at the Deluxe Wash level and above, allowing customers to wash their vehicles as frequently as desired for an affordable monthly rate. According to their marketing, customers who visit twice per month can have their membership pay for itself. Four Seasons also offers gift cards for those looking to give the service as a present. Their headquarters is located in Centerville, Ohio, and the company emphasizes their commitment to customer service with onsite security cameras for added peace of mind.

Beyond pet washing, Hurricane Carwash Webb City provides ceramic coating, undercarriage wash, tire shine, wax applications, and RV or oversized vehicle washing through its full-service offerings. The business holds a 4.2-star rating across 152 customer reviews. Call 417-310-3451 or visit during the 24-hour operating hours to access services whenever your schedule allows.

name: Solum Car Wash
description:
Solum Car Wash in New Richmond, Wisconsin operates a touchless automated wash system that completes exterior cleaning in 5 minutes or less using eco-friendly chemicals. The $15 Wash package delivers results comparable to a $100 detail job, according to the business's pricing messaging. Beyond the automated tunnel, Solum Car Wash offers six self-service bays that run for four minutes at $3.00 each, a self-service vacuum station, and a self-serve wash tunnel included with the monthly membership pass. The business accepts cash and credit card payment, plus mobile pay options.

Solum Car Wash has maintained the same ownership and operating philosophy since opening in 1985, when founder Jodi Solum established the business with a focus on value and customer service. The facility's undercarriage cleaning service and unlimited wash club membership provide options for regular customers seeking comprehensive maintenance. With a 4.3-star rating across 134 customer reviews, the business has earned recognition for outperforming other automatic car washes in the area.

Hours are Tuesday through Friday, 8AM–6PM, and Saturday 8AM–5PM; the facility closes Mondays and Sundays. To discuss membership options or schedule a visit, call (715) 246-5822.

name: Hoffman Car Wash
description:
Hoffman Car Wash operates a network of 29 locations offering monthly unlimited wash club memberships with tiered service packages ranging from basic Exterior ($29.99/month) to premium Signature with Interior Cleaning ($69.99/month). All packages feature touch-free drying technology combined with soft touch washing. The membership options include annual billing options at slightly reduced rates, providing customers flexibility in payment preferences. Members can wash at all 29 locations and enjoy benefits like undercarriage washing, wheel cleaning, tire shine, hot wax application, and advanced protective coatings including Carbonite and Ceramic Shield & Shine.

The service tiers accommodate various customer needs, from basic exterior cleaning to comprehensive packages that include interior detailing with carpet vacuuming, vinyl and plastic surface cleaning, door jamb cleaning, interior glass cleaning, and towel drying. Higher-tier packages include premium protective treatments such as Vision Clear for windows and Ceramic Shield & Shine for paint protection. Hoffman Car Wash also offers additional services including express detail packages, a fleet program for commercial customers, and an online shop. The company demonstrates community commitment through programs like food drives, veteran appreciation on Veterans Day, supporting Breakthrough T1D diabetes organization, and American Red Cross fundraising initiatives through the Helping Hands program.

name: A C Touchless Car Wash
description:
A C Touchless Car Wash is a self-service facility located in Frankston, TX at 709 N Garrison St #701 that specializes in automated touchless vehicle cleaning. The facility features cutting-edge technology including foam cannons and high-pressure rinsing systems designed to deliver a meticulous finish without any contact with the vehicle's surface. The operation offers multiple wash packages, including a deluxe option that features a wax finish, providing customers with flexible choices for their vehicle maintenance needs. The facility emphasizes eco-friendly practices and convenient self-service operations that allow customers to avoid long lines.

Customer feedback consistently highlights the quality and effectiveness of the touchless system, with patrons reporting exceptional cleaning results and vehicles looking "brand new" after washing. The automated system is described as user-friendly and straightforward to operate, with various wash settings available to accommodate different cleaning needs. While reviews praise the foam soap effectiveness and overall service quality, some customers noted minor areas for improvement, including more efficient drying features and more powerful vacuum stations. The facility maintains well-maintained equipment and offers reasonable pricing for the services provided.

customer_reviews.review: Just had a great experience at this car wash! Quick and easy process. My car looks fabulous now!

I recently discovered this self-service car wash, and let me tell you, I'm impressed! I love that I can wash my car whenever I want, without having to deal with long lines. The automated system is straightforward and user-friendly, and I appreciate the variety of wash settings available. My favorite aspect is the foam soap; it does such a great job at lifting dirt and grime. I did notice a minor issue with the drying feature, though—it could be a bit more efficient. I ended up having to towel dry a few spots myself, but that's a small price to pay for the convenience. Overall, it's a fantastic spot to keep your vehicle looking sharp, and I will be returning for sure!

What a gem of a car wash! I visited on a Saturday morning and was pleasantly surprised by how clean and well-organized everything was. The touchless feature was definitely a highlight for me. My car had muddy spots from a recent road trip, and I was worried they wouldn't come off. To my delight, the wash did an exceptional job, and it looked pristine afterward! I also loved that they offered a variety of options at reasonable prices. One thing I wish they could improve on is having some sort of waiting area or seating, as I had to stand while waiting for my car to finish. However, the experience was so positive overall that I'll overlook that minor detail. Definitely a great place for anyone looking for a high-quality wash!

I can't say enough good things about this car wash! The touchless system is incredible; it left my car sparkling clean without any scratches or swirls. I was a bit apprehensive when I first drove in, but the whole process was super easy and intuitive. The equipment was well-maintained, and I could tell they take pride in their service. The wash options were clear, and I opted for the deluxe package, which included a wax finish. Wow, my car looked brand new! The only minor hiccup was that I felt the vacuum stations could have been a bit more powerful. But overall, this place exceeded my expectations. I will definitely be back regularly to keep my car looking its best. Highly recommend it to anyone who loves a clean ride without the hassle of traditional washes!

name: Hoffman Car Wash
description:
Hoffman Car Wash in Wynantskill, NY operates a touchless automated system that cleans without brushes or contact, available 24 hours daily across all seven days of the week. The Exterior package at $13.00 provides touch-free wash and dry, while the Ultimate at $18.00 adds undercarriage cleaning and polish wax protection, and the Signature at $22.00 includes tri-foam wax and extended drying for maximum shine. Beyond automated options, the facility offers self-serve bays with self-service shampoo capability, free vacuums, tire shine application, towels, and undercarriage wash services. Hoffman Car Wash accepts all major credit cards and mobile pay, with well-lit facilities throughout. Members can join the Unlimited Car Wash Club for recurring washes, and the location maintains a 4.1-star rating based on 258 customer reviews.

The 24-hour accessibility at 440 Whiteview Rd makes Hoffman Car Wash available whenever you need it, whether for routine maintenance or quick cleaning between errands. Call the Wynantskill location or check your preferred payment method acceptance before visiting during your convenient time.

name: Touchfree Car Wash
description:
Touchfree Car Wash in East Providence, RI offers automated brushless washing technology to help protect your vehicle's paint and finish. Located at 2336 Pawtucket Ave, this touchless car wash provides a hands-free cleaning alternative to traditional methods. The brushless system uses high-pressure water and cleaning solutions to remove dirt and grime without making contact with your car's surface, reducing the risk of scratches and swirl marks.

The facility operates as a self-service automated wash station, making it a convenient option for East Providence residents and visitors looking for quick vehicle cleaning. Whether you're preparing for a special occasion or maintaining regular car care, Touchfree Car Wash delivers a no-contact wash experience. Stop by to see if this touchless approach works for your vehicle maintenance needs.

name: PortSide 5
description:
PortSide 5 in Fayetteville, Arkansas operates 24 hours daily at 5800 Wilkerson St, making it accessible whenever you need a wash. This locally owned and operated location is part of a four-location network that PortSide describes as offering "the most versatile car washes in all of Northwest Arkansas," with equipment including touch free automatics, soft scrub automatics with closed cell foam brushes, self-service bays, and multiple vacuums. The Fayetteville location specifically features 4 self-service bays, 2 touch free automatics, 6 vacuums, and a full line of detailing supplies, plus carpet shampooers for interior cleaning.

PortSide 5 accepts multiple payment methods—bills, quarters, dollar coins, credit cards, debit cards, Apple Pay, and Google Wallet—to accommodate different preferences. The Wash Club membership allows you to wash once per day for one monthly price through the EverWash app, with the Super Wash Package usable at all four PortSide locations. Fleet accounts are available for commercial customers. With a 3.9-star rating from 56 customer reviews, the business has established a track record in the Fayetteville area. Visit during any of the 24-hour operating hours, or contact the business through their website at portsidenwa.com for specific questions about services or membership details.

name: Classy Chassis Self-Serve Car Wash
description:
Classy Chassis Self-Serve Car Wash in Gig Harbor, WA offers a convenient touchless, brushless automated washing experience at 6755 Kimball Dr. This self-serve facility features multiple bays equipped to handle standard vehicles, RVs, and oversized vehicles, giving you flexibility in how you wash your car. With open access 24 hours on Wednesdays, you can clean your vehicle on your own schedule.

Beyond the basic wash, Classy Chassis provides a range of amenities to complement your visit. Free vacuuming stations help you tackle the interior, while additional services include tire shine and air freshener options. The facility also offers dog wash stations, making it convenient if you need to freshen up your pet. Members can take advantage of the Unlimited Wash Club for regular savings on visits.

Whether you're a local resident or passing through the Gig Harbor area, this self-serve location provides an accessible and well-equipped option for vehicle maintenance. For current hours, membership details, and additional services, check their website or contact the facility directly.

name: Cruisers Car Wash Express
description: Cruisers Car Wash Express in Wilmington, NC operates a touchless automated wash location at 1500 Shipyard Blvd with four large self-serve bays, an automatic touch-free wash option, and a soft cloth wash setting. The facility includes eight free vacuums and over an acre of parking space for customers who want to complete detailing work on their own. Friday hours run 24 hours, making it accessible for late-night or early-morning vehicle maintenance. The business has been operating since 1998 and has been voted best wash 18 times by readers of the Wilmington Star News and Encore Magazine. Cruisers also operates full-service detailing locations at 3835 Oleander Drive (910-799-6511) and 325 S College Road (910-799-0070), both open Monday–Saturday 9:00 am–5:00 pm and Sunday 10:00 am–5:00 pm. For details about their Car Wash & Detailing Packages or Express Wash options, call the Shipyard Boulevard location during Friday's 24-hour operating window.

name: Car Wash Express, Inc.
description:
Car Wash Express, Inc. has been serving the Midway, GA community since 1998, establishing itself as a leader in Georgia's car wash industry. Located at 11169 E Oglethorpe Hwy, this locally owned and operated business features state-of-the-art touchless technology with WashWorld Touch-Free and MacNeil Express Tunnel systems that deliver professional-grade cleaning without brushes. With a 3.7-star rating from 66 customer reviews, Car Wash Express offers multiple wash options to suit every vehicle care need, from express packages to comprehensive detailing services.

Open 24 hours, seven days a week, Car Wash Express provides convenient access whenever you need it. Members can take advantage of the Unlimited WashPass membership program, which offers unlimited wash access for customers seeking regular vehicle maintenance. Beyond automated tunnels, the facility also includes self-serve bays for those who prefer hands-on washing. Every wash is backed by a Superior Wash Guarantee—if you're not satisfied, they'll make it right. Whether you're a long-time customer or visiting for the first time, Car Wash Express combines Southern hospitality with industry-leading equipment and consistent service quality.

name: Foam & Wash Car Wash
description:
Foam & Wash Car Wash in Hyde Park, NY offers convenient self-serve wash options available 24/7 at 5 Alexander Dr. Choose from flexible packages starting at $5 for 7 minutes, $8 for 12 minutes, or $10 for 20 minutes, with additional pay-per-minute options at $1 per minute. The facility accepts both cash and card payments, making it easy to wash your vehicle on your schedule.

Beyond the self-serve bays, Foam & Wash provides complimentary vacuums open around the clock, plus premium add-on services including ceramic coating, wax, tire shine, and undercarriage wash to protect and enhance your vehicle. The business also features a dedicated 24/7 dog wash station for pet owners. With a 4.0-star rating from 78 customer reviews, Foam & Wash has established itself as a reliable choice for vehicle maintenance in the Hyde Park area.

For frequent visitors, Foam & Wash offers a Go Unlimited membership program that provides savings on regular washes. New customers can take advantage of a free wash offer to experience the service firsthand. Whether you need a quick rinse or a thorough cleaning, Foam & Wash's self-serve model gives you control over your vehicle's care.

name: Splash n Dash Springfield, KY
description:
Splash n Dash Springfield, KY offers touchless automated car washing at 510 Lincoln Dr in Springfield, with convenient access 24 hours a day, seven days a week. The location features both express tunnel washing and self-serve bays, so you can choose the option that works best for your schedule. Most visits take just 10 minutes, making it easy to fit a car wash into your day. The facility also provides undercarriage cleaning to help protect your vehicle's underside from road salt and debris.

With a 4.3-star rating from nearly 50 customer reviews, Splash n Dash has earned customer trust through its safety-first approach—the equipment uses no products or machinery that may damage your car. The business stands behind its work with a 100% satisfaction guarantee and no-hassle refund policy. Members can take advantage of mobile pay options and an unlimited wash club membership, while all customers benefit from flexible wash packages. For more information about pricing and services, contact Splash n Dash at 270-865-4743 or visit their website.

name: K & D carwash
description:
K & D Car Wash in Lufkin, TX offers 24/7 access to the area's only touch-free automatic wash tunnel, along with 33 self-serve bays spread across six convenient locations. The touch-free technology eliminates worry about paint damage, and the system accommodates vehicles up to 7'8" tall—including dually pickups, oversized trucks, and RVs. Whether you're washing a golf cart or a work truck, K & D has the flexibility to handle nearly any vehicle.

Beyond the automatic tunnel, K & D provides in-bay handheld dryers, vacuums, bright LED lighting, and premium chemicals to ensure consistent, high-quality results. The pet wash facility with two tubs adds another convenient amenity for pet owners. With a solid 4.0-star rating from 71 customer reviews, the business is known for maintaining safe, clean facilities at fair pricing.

For frequent washers, the EverWash Unlimited membership starts at just $21 per month, letting you keep your vehicle sparkling clean year-round. Open every day from early morning through late night, K & D Car Wash at 501 S Chestnut St and other Lufkin locations make vehicle maintenance accessible whenever you need it.

description:
Marketplace Car Wash in Stillwater, MN offers convenient touchless automated washing combined with flexible self-serve options. Located at 1732 Market Drive, the facility features two automatic wash bays, four self-serve bays, and four vacuums to meet different customer preferences. The car wash operates 24 hours a day, seven days a week, making it accessible whenever you need it. name: The Washbox
description:
# The Washbox - 2011 S Main St, Farmville, VA

The Washbox in Farmville, VA offers touch-free automated car washing with commercial-grade equipment and premium products. Located at 2011 S Main St, this 24/7 facility features a touchless wash system that protects your vehicle's finish while delivering a deep clean. Choose from four wash packages: the Basic Wash for a straightforward exterior clean, Super Wash with Clear Coat Protectant, Works Wash including Triple Foam Polish and additional protection, or the Ultimate Wash featuring upgraded Triple Foam Polish, Bug Prep, and Ceramic Coat Finish. All washes use premium undiluted soaps and include a spot-free rinse and high-velocity drier for streak-free results.

Beyond the automated bays, The Washbox provides self-serve washing stations, professional-grade vacuums, and on-site vending machines with air fresheners and detailing wipes. The facility also offers ceramic coating treatments and carnauba wax (Wave Shield) protection options. Members of The Wash Club enjoy loyalty rewards through the mobile app, which also supports mobile payment for added convenience. Whether you need a quick wash or comprehensive protection, The Washbox's combination of touchless technology and quality finishes keeps your car looking its best. Open seven days a week, 24 hours daily, the Farmville location is accessible whenever you need it.

name: Mr Sparkle Car Wash
description:
Mr. Sparkle Car Wash's Newington, CT location at 25 Pane Rd offers a comprehensive range of automated car washing options to suit different customer preferences and budgets. The facility features three main service types: a Soft Touch Tunnel Car Wash (open Monday-Friday 7 AM-7 PM, Saturday 7 AM-6 PM, Sunday 8 AM-5 PM), a Laser Touchless Car Wash (24/7), and self-serve wash bays (24/7). The touchless laser wash options include four tiers—Express Laser ($12), Deluxe Laser ($16), Super Laser ($20), and Ultimate Laser ($24)—each building on previous features with additions like ceramic shield, wax, and undercarriage protection.

For customers preferring the soft touch tunnel experience, the location offers four unlimited monthly membership tiers: Bronze ($1,899/month promotional rate for first 3 months, then $2,499), Silver ($2,299 promotional, then $2,999), Gold ($2,699 promotional, then $3,499), and Platinum ($2,999 promotional, then $3,999). Single wash prices for these tiers range from $12 to $24. All packages include premium features such as ceramic shield protection, Simoniz hot wax, tire shine, wheel cleaning, undercarriage wash, and high-velocity blow dry. The location also provides self-serve bays equipped with various tools including high-pressure soap, foam brush, ceramic shield, tire cleaner, and turbo dry systems, making it accessible for customers who prefer a do-it-yourself approach.

# The Village Car Wash - Raymore

The Village Car Wash in Raymore operates a touchless automated car wash at 613 W Foxwood Dr, open 24 hours every day including holidays. name: Patriot Auto & Dog Wash
description:
Patriot Auto & Dog Wash is Springfield, Missouri's premier touchless car wash facility, offering a comprehensive range of services for both vehicles and pets. The business operates with an automated touchless exterior system featuring advanced sensing technology that contours to vehicle shapes, complemented by self-serve wash bays, high-powered vacuums, and onsite vending machines for additional car care products. The auto wash is open 24/7, while the premium self-service dog wash operates daily from 8AM-10PM.

The facility offers six subscription-based wash club plans with tiered pricing. Car-only options include the Ultimate Ceramic Club ($34.95/month) and Super Club ($29.95/month), both providing unlimited daily washes with features like ceramic protectant, triple foam, tire cleaner, undercarriage blast, and 3-minute self-serve wash time. Combo clubs pairing auto and dog wash services are available at $54.95/month (Ultimate Ceramic) and $49.95/month (Super), with dog wash limited to one wash per week. A standalone Dog Wash Club is offered at $24.95/month, including shampoo, conditioner, flea & tick treatment, and a 2-speed dryer.

The business emphasizes convenience through its state-of-the-art mobile app, which enables phone payment, loyalty point accumulation, eGift sending, and access to exclusive mobile-only offers. Located at 1835 W Kingsley St, Patriot Auto & Dog Wash serves Springfield and surrounding communities with a promise of clean cars, happy dogs, and satisfied customers.

description:
Emma's Baywash in Orlando, FL offers both self-service and touchless automated washing options at 755 S Goldenrod Rd. With 3.9 stars from over 322 customer reviews, the facility uses brushless technology to clean your vehicle without contact, protecting your paint while delivering effective results. Services include undercarriage cleaning and complimentary vacuums to handle interior maintenance.

Operating 24 hours daily, Emma's Baywash accommodates any schedule with mobile pay options for convenient transactions. Whether you prefer the hands-on control of self-service bays or the speed of automated touchless washing, this Orlando car wash provides flexible cleaning solutions for vehicle owners across the area.

name: Soaps N Suds Auto Spa
description:
Soaps N Suds Auto Spa in Norfolk, VA operates a touchless, brushless car wash system open 24 hours a day, seven days a week at 810 W 25th St, eliminating the risk of brush-related scratches that customers want to avoid. The EXPRESS WASH at $8 includes an undercarriage rinse and spot-free rinse, while the PREMIUM WASH at $10 adds a clear coat sealant and blow dry for customers seeking extra protection. The ULTIMATE WASH at $15 incorporates a triple bug pass and foaming polish for removing insects and buildup, and the PLATINUM WASH at $15 provides carnauba wax coverage for maximum gloss. Each wash completes in approximately five minutes using high-pressure water jets, and card-operated bays allow customers to pay with cash or major credit and debit cards. Self-serve locations are also available for those who prefer hands-on cleaning. Soaps N Suds Auto Spa's location in the Ghent area makes it accessible for Norfolk residents and visitors who need quick vehicle maintenance without appointments.

Contact the business through their help center at soapsnsuds.com/contact-us, or visit the Norfolk location during the 24-hour operating hours to select your preferred wash package.

name: Sunrise Carwash
description: Sunrise Carwash at 7684 S Brockway Rd in Brockway, MI offers Touch Free Laser Wash, Soft Touch Automatic Washes, and Touch Free Automatic Washes for drivers who prefer different wash methods. The location operates 24 hours on Fridays, providing round-the-clock access to its equipment. Beyond automated options, Sunrise Carwash includes self-serve bays for customers who want hands-on control, plus a dedicated dog wash station for pet owners. Free vacuums are available on-site for interior cleaning. Call ahead or check the website for complete hours and pricing for weekdays and other days of the week.

name: Time To Shine Car Wash
description:
Time To Shine Car Wash at 620 N Maize Rd in Wichita, KS operates a touchless automated system with five self-serve bays available around the clock, 365 days a year. The facility uses High Pressure Laser Rinse, High Velocity Dry, and Spot Free Rinse technology under new LED lighting, with an 11-foot clearance height in the extra-large bay designed specifically for RVs and larger vehicles. Four wash packages accommodate different budgets: the Express at $7 includes hot soap and spot-free dry, the Deluxe at $9 adds undercarriage cleaning and Turtle Wax sealant, the Ultimate at $11 features Blazin' Glaze coating plus Turtle Wax sealant, and the Turtle Wax Complete at $14 provides a triple-pass front wash with undercarriage cleaning and maximum sealant protection.

Beyond the automatic bays, Time To Shine Car Wash offers free vacuums and a free membership discount program. The business accepts both cash and credit cards and maintains a 4.0-star rating across 144 customer reviews. Services include tire shine and undercarriage wash options available at most package levels. Call (316) 440-9380 or visit anytime since the facility is open 24 hours daily.

name: Auto Spa Saluda
description:
Auto Spa Saluda, located at 2759 General Puller Hwy in Saluda, VA, offers convenient 24-hour car care services seven days a week. The facility features self-serve bays alongside professional services including ceramic coating, interior detailing, tire shine, and wax application. Customers can take advantage of complimentary vacuum service as part of their visit, making it easy to handle both exterior and interior cleaning needs in one stop.

With a solid 4.2-star rating based on 76 customer reviews, Auto Spa Saluda has established itself as a reliable choice for vehicle maintenance in the Saluda area. The combination of round-the-clock availability and diverse service options—from DIY self-serve bays to full-service detailing—makes it accessible whether you need a quick wash late at night or comprehensive car care during regular hours.
