name: Loaf 'N Jug Car Wash
description:
Loaf 'N Jug Car Wash in Pueblo, CO operates a self-service touchless car wash where you control the cleaning process using spacious wash bays equipped with pressure washers and multiple wash cycles. The facility uses eco-friendly cleaning products and offers quality foam soap options, so you can customize your approach based on your vehicle's needs. After washing, you have access to a drying station and free vacuums to finish the job, plus microfiber towels are available for final detailing.

The self-service model at 420 Eagleridge Blvd keeps costs lower than full-service alternatives while maintaining professional-grade equipment and facilities. Customers note the setup is user-friendly with well-maintained equipment and effective drying stations, though vacuum stations experience high demand during peak hours. The business is open 24 hours on Fridays, and the 3.7-star rating reflects feedback praising the modern equipment, eco-friendly approach, and value for the price.

For a wash session, call 719-546-1687 or visit the location at 420 Eagleridge Blvd, Pueblo, CO 81008. Friday is the only day listed as open 24 hours—confirm current hours for other days before heading in.

name: Scooptown Car Wash
description:
Scooptown Car Wash in Sturgis, SD operates 24 hours daily across all seven days of the week at 710 Anna St, offering three distinct automated wash methods—Touch Free, Soft Touch with foam and felt cloth strips, and Self Serve bays with specialized cleaning products. The business maintains a 4.6-star rating from 310 customer reviews and functions as both a car wash and pet grooming facility, distinguishing itself by operating self-serve bays alongside automated options. Beyond vehicle cleaning, Scooptown Car Wash operates a dedicated pet wash station, eliminating the need to clean pets at home.

Payment flexibility includes the Touch4Wash mobile app for starting and paying for washes, plus credit card acceptance. Customers have access to free vacuums on-site and can enroll in an unlimited wash club for regular users. The locally owned business accepts mobile pay through its dedicated app, streamlining the transaction process. For specific details on service pricing, membership tiers, or to schedule a pet wash appointment, call 605-720-7800 during their 24-hour operating hours.

name: Poseidon Car Wash
description: Poseidon Car Wash in Snowflake, AZ operates a touchless automated system powered by high-pressure water jets, making it one of four Arizona locations under the Poseidon brand. The facility offers three distinct service options: Touch-Free Automatic washing, Self Service bays equipped with foaming brushes and triple foam, and hand-held dryers for customer control. Customers also have access to high-powered vacuums and vending machines stocked with supplies on-site. The business describes itself as "Where Your Car Meets the God of Clean" and maintains a 3.8-star rating across 210 customer reviews. Poseidon Car Wash operates 24 hours daily, seven days a week at 760 S Main St, with membership options available. The Chandler location additionally features a water and ice machine for added convenience. Call ahead or visit during the always-open hours to use whichever service matches your cleaning needs.

name: Cache Car Wash 1
description: Cache Car Wash 1 in Logan, UT operates a touchless automated system at 1205 Main St, making it a brushless option for drivers concerned about paint contact. The facility offers four tiered membership plans ranging from the Cache Saver at $18.99/month, which includes undercarriage cleaning and a protective clear coat finish, up to the Cache Bonus at $34.99/month, which adds carnauba hot wax and an extra rinse. Beyond memberships, the location provides self-serve bays for those who prefer hands-on washing, along with specialized services including Detail Service, Ceramic Coating, and Interior Express Cleaning. A free vacuum is available to all customers. The business maintains a 4.3-star rating and opens 24 hours on Wednesdays. To schedule a detail service or manage an existing membership, visit the website or call during operating hours.

name: Sparkle's Car Wash
description:
Sparkle's Car Wash in Cedar City, Utah operates a touchless automated facility established in 2007 by owners Travis and Amyanne, longtime Southern Utah residents. The business at 180 E Fiddlers Canyon Rd offers three service types—Soft Touch Automatic, Touch Free Automatic, and Self-Serve Bays—with a 100% self-serve option available for customers who prefer to wash their own vehicles. Monthly Wash Clubs start at $20.99/month, providing recurring savings for frequent users.

Beyond standard cars, Sparkle's accommodates RVs, trailers, and trucks through dedicated oversized vehicle washing. The facility includes a pet wash station with an indoor pet wash option, plus free vacuums for finishing touches. Operating 24 hours on Wednesdays and during other posted hours, the business maintains a 4.4-star rating, with customer feedback specifically highlighting the soft touch automatic's cleaning quality, the convenience of indoor pet washing, and budget-friendly pricing for both automated and self-service options.

Contact Sparkle's Car Wash at 435-867-9646 for assistance and information about wash club memberships or current hours.

name: H&S Gas
description:
H&S Gas in Nice, CA has served the community since 1996 as a full-service fueling and vehicle care destination. Located at 3444 E Hwy 20, the facility offers touchless, brushless automated car wash technology alongside top-tier gasoline from major suppliers including Chevron, Texaco, and Shell. Whether you need a quick wash or fuel, H&S Gas provides convenient self-serve stations in one location.

Beyond car washing, H&S Gas supports your complete vehicle maintenance needs with a full-service auto center. The site also includes convenience stores—Extra Mile and Power Market—so you can handle errands while servicing your vehicle. It's a practical one-stop option for Nice-area drivers seeking fuel, car care, and groceries.

Our self-serve stations are equipped with convenience stores, Extra Mile and Power Market, for your grocery needs. Additionally, we provide comprehensive car wash services and full-service auto centers for vehicle maintenance.

name: Johnny's Pet & Car Wash
description:
Johnny's Pet & Car Wash in Kaysville, UT operates a touchless car wash system at 89 W 320 N, offering automatic washing, self-serve bays, and free vacuums that require no coins with any wash. The facility runs 24 hours on Wednesdays and provides a Monthly Wash Club membership that grants unlimited access to all services including the touchless wash, vacuuming, and self-serve washing options. Beyond vehicle cleaning, Johnny's Pet & Car Wash distinguishes itself with a self-service pet wash station where customers can clean their own dogs, plus bike wash capabilities. The free vacuums available on-site are described as powerful and easy-to-use, included automatically rather than requiring payment. With a 4.0-star rating, the business combines automated touchless washing technology with the flexibility of self-serve bays for customers who prefer hands-on control. The Monthly Wash Club membership allows regular visitors to consolidate their car and pet wash needs in one location without per-visit costs.

For pricing details on the Monthly Wash Club or to join, contact Johnny's Pet & Car Wash at 89 W 320 N, Kaysville, UT 84037, or visit during the extended hours listed on their website.

name: Race Track Car Wash
description:
Race Track Car Wash and Detail Shop is located in Dover, Delaware at 226 North Dupont Highway, just 2 miles south of Dover Speedway on Route 13. The facility operates as the largest car wash in Delaware and features state-of-the-art equipment. They offer three monthly unlimited wash packages: the Regular Outside Wash at $20/month, the Deluxe Outside Wash at $35/month, and the Extreme Outside Package at $45/month, with single wash pricing also available at $10, $15, and $20 respectively.

In addition to their full-service tunnel car wash, Race Track provides professional detailing services with no job considered too big or small, and operates eight self-serve bays for customer convenience. The business is open Monday through Saturday from 8 AM to 5:30 PM and Sunday from 8 AM to 5 PM. Customers can manage their memberships and order services through their online customer portal. The facility has received positive customer reviews on Facebook, with customers praising their detailing work and consistent quality service.

name: Spirit of America Car Wash
description:
Spirit of America Car Wash, located at 5115 W 63rd St in Chicago, operates 24 hours a day every day of the week, making it accessible whenever you need a wash. The business has offered touch-free and rail-free automatic washing since 1991, now with over 30 years of experience serving the Chicagoland area from six locations. Their four touchless wash tiers range from the Basic Wash at $5—which includes undercarriage cleaning, protective wax, and spot-free rinse—up to the Extreme Clean at $14, which uses double soap and rinse passes for maximum coverage. For customers who wash regularly, the 1 Car Basic Wash Club costs $15 per month, while the 1 Car Extreme Wash Club runs $39 per month, both requiring a three-month commitment through their mobile app.

Beyond the automated bays, Spirit of America operates self-serve bays and provides free vacuums, interior cleaning options, mat cleaners, tire shine, and undercarriage wash services. The Ultimate Wash at $10 includes seasonal bug removal and premium polish wax, occupying a middle ground between the Premium Wash's enhanced soap cycles and the Extreme Clean's dual-pass approach. Those with multiple vehicles can join the 2 Car Premium Wash Club at $29 per month up to the 2 Car Extreme Wash Club at $49 per month. Customers can pay via cash, credit card, debit card, or mobile app. The business holds a 3.8-star rating from 428 customer reviews. Visit the location anytime or download their mobile app from Apple or Google Play to manage memberships and payments.

name: Auto Bright Car Care
description:
Auto Bright Car Wash is a full-service automotive care facility located at 105 Hollis Street in Framingham, MA 01702. The business operates an all-cloth car wash system with an unlimited club membership option available through their customer portal. In addition to car washing services, Auto Bright offers express oil change service with a promotion of a free car wash included with every oil change. The facility also features 24-hour gas and diesel fuel pumps along with a convenience store for customer convenience.

Beyond basic car washing, Auto Bright provides comprehensive auto detailing services for both interior and exterior vehicle cleaning, with online booking available. Customer reviews highlight exceptional service quality, including professional detailing work and outstanding customer service such as complimentary rides home during service. The business can be reached at (508) 879-3585 and maintains a presence on social media platforms including Facebook, Twitter, and Yelp for customer engagement and updates.

name: Car Wash Express, Inc
amenities: unlimited wash club (implied by mention of packages)
description:
Car Wash Express, Inc. has operated as a locally owned business in Brunswick, GA since November 1998, growing into one of Georgia's largest car wash chains with eight locations across the Southeast. The Brunswick location at 2100 Perry Lane Rd operates 24 hours daily, seven days a week, using WashWorld Touch-Free and MacNeil Express Tunnels equipment to deliver consistent results across three service formats: self-serve bays, touch-free automatics, and express tunnels. The business stands behind a superior wash guarantee—if you're not satisfied, they'll make it right at no additional charge.

Members can subscribe to the Unlimited WashPass for unlimited visits, while mobile pay options are available for flexible transactions. The facility's touch-free, brushless system minimizes contact with your vehicle's surface during the automated wash cycle. With a 3.9-star rating across 24 customer reviews, Car Wash Express positions itself as "YOUR CAR WILL NEVER WANT TO LEAVE...because WE'RE NOT JUST ANOTHER CAR WASH!" in their own words. Call ahead or visit during open hours to inquire about current membership pricing and available wash packages suited to your vehicle's needs.

name: E Z Clean Car Wash
description:
E Z Clean Car Wash, located at 508 TX-107 in Edcouch, TX, offers a convenient touchless washing solution for the local community. The facility features self-serve bays for customers who prefer hands-on control, along with a free vacuum service to help complete your vehicle's cleaning. With a current rating of 3.8 out of 5 stars, E Z Clean provides accessible car washing options without requiring a trip to a distant facility.

The business stands out with its membership program and unlimited wash club, allowing regular customers to maximize value with frequent visits. These membership options make E Z Clean an economical choice for Edcouch residents looking to maintain their vehicles on a budget. For more information about specific wash packages, pricing, and current hours of operation, you can visit their website at ezcleancarwash.net.

name: Super Carwash and Emissions
description:
Super Car Wash & Emissions is located in Buford, GA at 2546 Braselton Hwy, serving Braselton, Hoschton, Dacula, Flowery Branch, and surrounding communities across Barrow, Gwinnett, Hall, and Jackson counties. The facility features a state-of-the-art touchless automated wash system available 24 hours a day, seven days a week, utilizing industry-leading technology with built-in intelligence to deliver clean, shiny, and spot-free results without brushes or tire-contact rails.

In addition to automated washing, Super Car Wash & Emissions offers self-service car wash bays open 24/7, complete with free vacuum service and high-pressure hose access with quality automobile shampoo for customers who prefer hands-on control. The business also provides Georgia state emissions inspections Monday through Saturday from 8:30 AM to 6:00 PM, including on-board diagnostics testing, fuel cap inspection, and visual catalytic converter inspection to ensure compliance with state requirements for vehicle registration renewal.

name: OasisTouch-less Car Wash
description: OasisTouch-less Car Wash in El Paso operates 24 hours on Wednesdays at its location in the Home Depot parking lot at 7411 Remcon, offering three fixed-price packages ranging from $6.00 to $10.00. The $6.00 Complete wash includes undercarriage cleaning, double-pass scrubbing, and spot-free rinse; the $8.00 package adds protective triple foam polish and clear coat sealant; and the $10.00 Premium option includes Rain X water beading treatment. The touchless technology uses an Air Cannon Blower for drying and avoids brush contact with your paint, which customer feedback confirms prevents car damage. A separate vacuum area is available with specialty cleaning products on-site, allowing DIY post-wash work for under $10 total according to customer reports. The business accepts credit cards, debit cards, and cash for payment. OasisTouch-less Car Wash is locally owned and operated as part of a 6-location network throughout El Paso that has served the area for over 8 years, with two lanes available to keep wait times minimal. Tire shining service is offered at this location alongside the core wash packages. Call or visit during the 24-hour Wednesday operation, or check the website to confirm current hours for other days at 7411 Remcon in the Home Depot parking lot.

description:
Sudz Car Wash in Gonzales, TX operates 24 hours a day, seven days a week, using a PDQ LaserWash 360 Plus automatic car wash with an overhead design and improved vehicle positioning system for touchless cleaning. The facility is locally owned and offers an Unlimited Wash program starting at $16 per month through the EverWash App, where customers can apply the promo code "sudz" for 50% off the first month. Beyond the automatic laser wash, Sudz provides self-serve wash bays with free vacuums and towels for customers who prefer hands-on cleaning, plus undercarriage cleaning service.

The business has earned a 4.6-star rating across 237 customer reviews, with feedback highlighting the quality vacuums, friendly staff, and pristine interior and exterior cleaning results. Mobile detailing is available, offering both interior and exterior detailing services that can be scheduled through the website. Sudz accepts mobile pay via the EverWash App and promo codes for added flexibility.

For detailing appointments or questions, contact Sudz Car Wash at (830) 476-5510. The detailing service operates Monday through Saturday from 8 AM to 5:30 PM, while the 24-hour automatic car wash and self-serve bays remain accessible anytime.

description: Washman Car Wash in Longview offers comprehensive vehicle cleaning services at 1039 15th Ave, catering to more than just standard cars. Their service menu includes RV and oversized vehicle washing, interior cleaning, detailing, undercarriage wash, and tire shine—making them a full-service option for various vehicle types in the area. The business features an unlimited wash club and membership program, providing flexible options for regular customers who want to maintain their vehicles throughout the year. Open Wednesday from 8AM to 6:30PM, Washman Car Wash maintains a solid 4.2-star rating and invites customers to visit their website at washmanusa.com/locations/Longview for additional details about their services and membership benefits.

name: Zaug Wash
description:
Zaug Wash in Rapid City, SD operates a touchless Laser Wash system using Lustra Professional Car Care Products across four automatic bay packages ranging from the Express Zaug at $11 to the Ceramic Zaug at $18. The Ceramic Zaug package includes undercarriage wash, heated presoaks, triple foam polish, ceramic protection, and extra dry time for a showroom finish, while the Ultimate Zaug at $15 adds UV-protected clear coat and triple-pass coverage. The Super Zaug at $13 covers deep cleaning with undercarriage wash and heated presoaks, and the Express Zaug provides essential cleaning with UV protection and spot-free rinse. For hands-on control, self-serve bays cost $5 for five minutes with high-pressure equipment and soap, and the facility also offers free vacuums and an unlimited wash club membership option.

Zaug Wash backs its service with a 100% customer satisfaction guarantee. The business is open Wednesday from 6AM to 10PM at 612 Timmons Blvd and accepts both cash and credit card. Customer feedback highlights the touchless technology, ample drying time on premium packages, and clean, organized self-service bays. To view current promotions or book a wash, contact the business during operating hours or visit their location in Rapid City.

name: Sparkle Buggy Car Wash
description:
Sparkle Buggy Car Wash, located at 1037 M-15 in Davison, MI, offers a comprehensive touchless washing experience with several convenient amenities for local vehicle owners. The facility features self-serve bays for those who prefer hands-on cleaning, along with professional services including interior cleaning, ceramic coating, and undercarriage washing. Members can take advantage of the unlimited wash club and membership program, which provide regular savings for frequent visitors. The location also includes complimentary vacuuming services to help keep your vehicle's interior fresh.

Open Friday from 8AM to 8PM, Sparkle Buggy Car Wash serves the Davison community with flexible service options suited to different cleaning preferences and budgets. Whether you're looking for a quick wash or a full detailing service with ceramic protection, the combination of touchless technology and self-serve options makes it accessible for various car care needs.

name: Autorific Self-Service Car Wash
description:
Autorific Self-Service Car Wash, located at 2925 Guess Rd in Durham, NC, offers a convenient option for drivers who prefer to wash their own vehicles. The facility is open daily from 8AM-7PM Monday through Saturday, with Sunday hours from 12-8PM, making it accessible throughout the week. Members can take advantage of the membership program for potential savings on regular visits, while all customers benefit from the complimentary vacuum stations included with their wash. The location also features restroom facilities for added convenience during your visit.

With a solid 4.1-star rating based on 338 customer reviews, Autorific has established itself as a reliable choice in the Durham area. For more details about current offerings and membership options, you can visit their website at autorific.net.

name: Conway Carwash
description: Conway Carwash offers convenient self-serve bay options at their location on 16th Avenue in Conway, SC, perfect for drivers who prefer hands-on control over their cleaning process. The facility is equipped with high-pressure rinsing, foam brush, wax, and tire shine options, allowing customers to customize their wash to their specific needs. They also provide vacuum services and use eco-friendly products, making it a responsible choice for vehicle maintenance. With 24-hour availability every day of the week, Conway Carwash accommodates early risers, night owls, and anyone with an unpredictable schedule. The business maintains a solid 4.2-star rating across 194 reviews, reflecting consistent service quality that keeps customers returning.

name: Freedom Carwash
description:
Freedom Carwash in Sealy, TX offers touchless, brushless automated washing that's gentle on your vehicle's paint while delivering a thorough clean. Located at 1405 Meyer St, this carwash is open 24 hours a day, seven days a week, making it convenient whenever you need it. With a 4.1-star rating from 70 customer reviews, Freedom Carwash has earned trust in the Sealy community for reliable service.

Beyond the automated wash, Freedom Carwash provides a full range of services to meet different needs and budgets. Choose from multiple wash packages, take advantage of the complimentary vacuum service, or opt for professional hand car wash and detailing for a premium finish. Self-serve bays are available for those who prefer to wash their own vehicles, and a spotless rinse system ensures a streak-free shine. Mobile pay options make transactions quick and easy, whether you're stopping by at noon or midnight.

name: Double Bubble Auto Wash
description: Double Bubble Auto Wash in Prince Frederick, MD operates a touchless automated system that washes the vehicle surface, tires, and rims using different foaming packages without brushes or contact. Located at 165 Central Square Drive, the facility is open 24 hours every day of the week, and accepts credit cards, debit cards, and contactless NFC payments—allowing customers to run a full wash cycle and settle payment at the end rather than prepaying with quarters. The self-service station includes a vacuum machine, and an undercarriage blast option addresses road salt and debris buildup. Customers report completing a basic suds and rinse cycle for around $3.50, with the touchless approach helping maintain paint condition and shine on trucks and trailers. description:

All self-serve bays accept cash, coin, credit, debit, and tap-to-pay options, while the drive-thru automatic accepts credit, debit, and tap-to-pay. customer_reviews.text: I've been searching for a reliable self-service car wash, and I have to say, I'm pretty impressed with this one! The setup is straightforward, and I appreciate the ample space to maneuver my truck. I opted for the foam brush option, which was great for tackling those stubborn spots. The water pressure was fantastic, and I really liked that they had a variety of cleaning supplies available. It made it easy to customize my wash to my needs. The only downside I noticed was that some of the machines seemed to take a bit longer than expected—perhaps they could upgrade a few of them for better efficiency. Still, the overall value and experience made it worthwhile. I'll keep coming back for sure!

This self-service car wash exceeded my expectations! As someone who loves keeping my car in top shape, I was delighted with how clean everything was upon arrival. The equipment was well-maintained, and I felt like I had a myriad of options at my disposal. The vacuums were powerful, and I appreciated having access to microfiber towels for that finishing touch. I was particularly impressed by the eco-friendly cleaning products they offered; it's nice to see a business prioritizing sustainability. If I had to give any feedback, I'd suggest adding more signage for first-timers to navigate the station more easily. Overall, an excellent spot that I will recommend to friends and family!

I had a fantastic experience at this car wash! The self-service stations were clean and well-maintained, which made the whole process super easy. I loved the variety of options available; I was able to get my SUV sparkling clean without any hassle. The pressure washers worked perfectly, and I appreciate how everything felt user-friendly. I will definitely be back to keep my car looking great! My only suggestion would be to add a few more vacuum stations, as they were a bit busy during my visit. Overall, a great place for a quick clean-up!

name: KB Laser Wash
description:
KB Laser Wash in Soldotna, Alaska operates 24/7 at 760 Kalifornsky Beach Road, with the philosophy that "Old school values meets new school technology." The facility offers three distinct washing methods: a Soft Touch option using the Tandem Surfline system that combines friction and high-pressure cleaning with full-coverage detergent to handle duallys and various vehicle types; a Touchless option with electronic vehicle sensing and high-pressure jets targeting tires, wheels, and rocker panels; and a Self Service option with pre-soak chemicals for customized cleaning. Beyond vehicle washing, KB Laser Wash includes a dog wash station and free vacuums for customers.

The Laser Clean package provides a two-stage wash with protective foam and spot-free rinse, while the Deluxe Wax adds carnauba wax coating and underbody/side blasters. The Ceramic package steps up with triple washing, ceramic coating, and complete undercarriage cleaning, and the Graphene option—their most advanced tier—features a graphene-ceramic hybrid coating with triple wash and full undercarriage coverage. Additional services include underbody wash, tire shine, and ceramic coating applications. The business holds a 4.8-star rating based on 54 customer reviews. Attendants are available from 9 am to 5 pm daily to assist customers, though the facility itself remains accessible 24 hours a day.

name: Cooper's Carwash
description:
Cooper's Carwash in Monroe, NC operates 24 hours daily and uses the Razor Edge Touchless Car Wash System, delivering zero-contact cleaning designed specifically for luxury and sport vehicles. The facility offers three distinct washing approaches: touchless automated washing through the Razor Edge system, soft-touch automatic washing via AUTEC equipment with roller brushes, and self-service bays with adjustable spray options for drivers who prefer hands-on control.

Wash packages range from $6 to $12, with the $6 basic touchless option providing a high-pressure rinse and spot-free finish, while the $12 premium touchless package includes triple foam polish, body shield, and extra protectant. For those choosing soft-touch, the $12 ultimate option adds tire cleaning, bug removal, and undercarriage washing. All automatic washes include clear coat protectant and spot-free rinsing. Beyond the wash bay, Cooper's provides free vacuums, towels, air freshener, tire shine, and supply vending for ceramic coating and detailing products.

Payment options include all major credit cards and cash, with mobile pay available. Call 704-776-4154 to confirm current hours, or visit the location at 1932 Old Charlotte Hwy during 24/7 operating times.

Ric & Stan's Carwash Inc.
description:
Ric & Stan's Car Wash operates a 24-hour location at 920 Dix Street in Otsego, Michigan. The facility offers multiple automated wash packages tiered by price and features: the Good package at $10.00 includes hot foam shampoo, high-pressure rinse, spot-free crystal rinse, and turbo blow dry; the Gooder package at $12.00 adds triple foam polish; the Good Golly package at $14.00 features clearcoat sealant, high-velocity side blast, and underbody wash; and the premium Git R Done and Good Golly Wash Plus options include hot wax treatments.

Beyond the automated wash options, the location provides self-serve wash bay access for customers who prefer hands-on cleaning. The business supports membership flexibility through their unlimited wash pass program and customer portal, allowing members to manage their subscriptions or cancel when needed. Additional services include gift card purchases and fleet account options for commercial customers. The facility can be reached at (269) 216-4542 for inquiries.

name: Laser Wash Inc
description:
Laser Wash Inc in Topeka, KS operates as a touchless automated car wash at 933 SW Fairlawn Rd, with a second location on Gage, both open 24 hours every day of the week. The business offers three tiered wash packages: a $20 basic exterior wash with spot-free rinse, a $50 package adding protective wax coating and undercarriage cleaning, and a $100 premium option that includes tire shine and triple foam pre-soak. Customers can pay through WashCards (prepaid cards that earn bonus rewards when reloaded), mobile pay via QR code at each bay, or online account management through the portal.

Beyond the automated bays, Laser Wash Inc provides free vacuums and self-serve washing stations for customers who prefer manual control. The business caters to fleet accounts with dedicated online management tools, allowing business vehicle maintenance to be tracked and administered remotely. With a 3.6-star rating across 191 reviews, the operation balances accessibility—touchless cleaning without brushes—with flexibility in payment methods and service options. Call to reach their Fairlawn location or visit during the 24-hour operating hours to set up a WashCard or mobile account through the QR code system at the bays.

name: White Horse Car Wash & Pet Wash
description:
White Horse Car Wash & Pet Wash in Voorhees Township, NJ operates a touchless automated system powered by MacNeil Car Wash Systems and D&S Car Wash Equipment, eliminating brush contact with your vehicle's exterior. The facility offers three tiered wash packages: the Express at $6.00 includes exterior wash, spot-free rinse, tire cleaning, and blow dry; the Deluxe at $12.00 adds wheel cleaning, undercarriage wash, wax, and rust protection; and The Works at $15.00 tops that with Rain-X and tire shine. According to the business's own tagline, "When your car needs a scrub, don't just bring it to any car wash. Give it a clean that lasts from White Horse Car Wash."

Beyond automated washes, White Horse offers 24/7 self-serve bays with Innovative Control Systems equipment accepting cash, quarters, and credit cards. The facility also provides professional detailing, interior cleaning, carpet and upholstery shampooing, pet wash services, free vacuums, air freshener, and mat cleaning. For frequent visitors, the Unlimited Monthly Wash Club comes in three tiers—Express at $12.95/month, Deluxe at $17.95/month, or The Works at $23.95/month—each paying for itself in roughly two washes, working out to less than $1 per day. The business is open 8AM to 8PM Monday through Sunday, with self-serve bays accessible around the clock. Call 856-627-2722 to inquire about memberships or current service options.

name: Foothills Carwash
description:

The facility offers tiered club pass packages ranging from $20 to $36, each with progressive features. The entry-level $20 package includes Underbody Blast, Wheels Cleaned, and Tire Shine. The mid-tier $28 option adds Foam Bath, Rain-X, Triple Foam Polish, and Clear Coat Protectant. The premium $36 package includes full Wax and Shine treatment along with all previous benefits. The carwash features special promotions throughout the week, including a free wash with any $10+ purchase on Tuesdays and the $18 wash available for $10 on Thursdays. name: Triple Crown Car Wash, LLC
description:

Sparkle Touch - Free Car Wash in Port St. Lucie, FL operates a touch-free automated system open 24/7, meaning no brushes contact your vehicle at any point during the wash. Four wash packages serve different needs: the Wash & Go at $7 provides basic presoak and rinse for routine maintenance, the Express at $9 adds a protective sealant and spot-free rinse, the Deluxe at $12 includes triple foam and double-dry for enhanced shine, and the Ultimate at $15 covers wheels, undercarriage, bug treatment, and includes a free vacuum token. For frequent washers, the Unlimited Express Wash membership costs $19.99 per month with presoak, high-pressure wash, spot-free rinse, and air dry included, while the Unlimited Deluxe Wash at $29.99 monthly adds triple foam, fusion wax, sealant, and underbody flush. Beyond automated washes, Sparkle Touch offers self-serve wash bays and ceramic coating services, plus free vacuum tokens available with qualifying packages. The location remains accessible every day of the week without closures, accommodating early morning or late-night car maintenance needs.

Contact Sparkle Touch at 772-344-2777 to ask about specific services, or visit anytime during their continuous 24/7 operation.

name: Rocky Mountain Car Wash
description:
Rocky Mountain Car Wash in Cheyenne, Wyoming offers touchless and soft-touch automated wash options designed to protect your vehicle's finish. Located at 3415 Ridge Rd, our facility is open 24/7 and equipped with four wash packages—Good Wash, Better Wash, Best Wash, and Ceramic Supernova Wash—to suit any budget and cleaning need. We also feature free vacuums available around the clock, self-serve bays for those who prefer hands-on cleaning, and specialized equipment that safely accommodates lifted trucks, duallys, and oversized vehicles including RVs.

For regular visitors, Rocky Mountain Car Wash offers monthly membership plans starting at $19.95/month for the Good Wash and scaling up to $55.95/month for the premium Ceramic Supernova Wash with unlimited access. Our well-lit facility ensures safe and convenient service whether you're stopping by during the day or late at night. Whether you need a quick touchless rinse or a comprehensive ceramic treatment, Rocky Mountain Car Wash combines reliability, flexible pricing, and 24/7 accessibility to keep your vehicle in top condition year-round.

name: Auto Craze Car and Pet Wash
description:
Auto Craze Car & Pet Wash operates two locations in Georgia (Cumming and Dawsonville), offering a comprehensive suite of washing services including express tunnel, touch-free automatic, and self-serve bays. The express tunnel operates Monday-Saturday 8:00 AM to 7:30 PM and Sunday 9:00 AM to 6:30 PM, while the touch-free automatic and self-serve bays are open 24/7. The facility pioneered the nation's first touchless wash as part of a membership program and uses state-of-the-art sensors with expertly adjusted water pressure and pH-balanced products for paint-safe cleaning.

Auto Craze offers four membership tiers for unlimited monthly washing: EXPRESS ($20/month), DELUXE ($26/month), WORKS ($34/month), and EXTREME ($39/month, marked as most popular). Single-wash options are also available at $10, $15, $20, and $25 respectively. Additional services include a commercial fleet wash program designed for Lyft, Uber, and taxi drivers, and a self-serve pet wash station open 7 days a week from 7am-10pm at just $10 for 10 minutes, then $1 per minute thereafter, offering 75% savings versus professional groomers.

All wash purchases include free amenities such as microfiber towels and access to their high-pressure self-serve bays with foaming brushes and premium detergents. Auto Craze also offers VIP Wash Pass gifts with discounts up to 50% off for bulk purchases, suitable for fundraisers, holidays, and employee rewards.

name: Home Run Market #8 & Major League Car Wash
description:
Major League Car Wash at Home Run Market #8 in Statesville, NC brings touchless automated washing to Old Mountain Road with top-tier service and affordability. This brushless car wash uses modern equipment combined with high-performance detergents and professional surface protectants to keep your vehicle looking fresh. With a 3.9-star rating from customer reviews, the location offers flexible wash options to fit any budget and includes self-serve bays for those who prefer hands-on cleaning.

Convenience is built into every visit. Major League Car Wash features an unlimited wash club and membership program for regular customers, plus mobile pay options and restrooms on-site. The Major League Car Wash app makes it easy to manage your account on the go. Located at 1920 Old Mountain Rd, the Statesville car wash operates early to late with extended hours—open 5AM–11PM Monday through Saturday, and 6AM–10PM on Sunday, so you can fit a wash into your schedule whenever it works best.

Home Run Market #8 combines car washing with a full-service convenience store and fuel station, offering diesel, propane, firewood, frozen foods, and ice all in one location. Multiple Major League Car Wash locations throughout the area mean quality service is never far away.

name: Mango Express Car Wash
description:
Mango Express Car Wash is a locally-owned, family-friendly express car wash with locations in West Chicago (151 S. Neltnor Blvd) and Schiller Park (4900 N. River Rd), Illinois. The business specializes in quick, affordable express washes completed in under 5 minutes using only the softest closed-foam brushes, gentlest biodegradable soaps, and high-quality ceramic coatings and waxes. Their signature low-profile conveyor belt technology is designed to be easy to maneuver and provides a safe, efficient wash experience.

Mango offers multiple service options including single luxury washes, non-commercial unlimited memberships, and commercial unlimited memberships. Customers can add ceramic coating to any wash and have free access to self-serve vacuums, towels, all-purpose cleaner, air guns, mat cleaner, and tire fill and gauge stations. The company stands behind a 110% satisfaction guarantee, committing to make things right if customers are not completely satisfied. They also offer a mobile app available on both iOS and Android, which provides a free $30 wash promotion upon download.

Call (305) 743-8121 to reach Key's Car Wash during its 24/7 operating hours, or visit the location on Overseas Highway whenever convenient.

name: Ernie's Self Serve Car Wash
description: Ernie's Self Serve Car Wash, located at 165 Market St in Potsdam, NY, offers a convenient touchless washing option for local residents and visitors. The facility includes a free vacuum station, making it easy to complete your vehicle's cleaning in one stop. With a solid 3.9-star rating based on 60 customer reviews, the car wash has established itself as a reliable choice in the Potsdam area. For more information about services and current offerings, you can visit their website at erniescarwashes.com.

name: Bowtie Express Car Wash
description:
Bowtie Car Wash is a soft-cloth car wash facility serving the Greater Louisville Area, with locations in Lyndon, Fern Creek, St. Matthews, Anchorage, Highview, Norton Commons, and Prospect. The business operates an exterior tunnel wash using soft cloth technology rather than brushes, ensuring a safe wash experience. They also offer hot air touchless dryers to safely dry vehicles and prevent spotting, with the dryers being safe even for convertibles. All vehicles are washed at the same price regardless of size, and professional attendants prepare cars before washing and handle hard-to-reach spots.

Bowtie Car Wash recently introduced unlimited wash packages, with pricing starting at only $11 per month and a promotional offer of buying 1 wash to get the first month free. They also offer a traditional loyalty program with a buy 4 washes, get 1 free deal. The facility provides 100% satisfaction guarantee and prides itself on fast, friendly service. For customers who prefer a DIY approach, covered self-serve bays are available equipped with cleaning products and vacuums, with helpful attendants on-site to assist.

name: Sunset Car Wash & K9000 Dog Wash
description: Sunset Car Wash & K9000 Dog Wash in Union City, TN operates a touchless automated car wash alongside a dedicated dog wash facility, both running 24 hours daily. The car wash completes vehicles in under four minutes using a brushless system, while the K9000 dog wash handles pets in approximately ten minutes. Established in 2022, the business combines two services under one location at 603 E Reelfoot Ave, distinguishing it from single-service operations in the area. With a 3.5-star rating from 41 customer reviews, the facility also offers self-service wash options alongside its automated equipment. Call (731) 507-0631 to confirm current pricing or visit anytime—the facility never closes.

name: Red Roof Car Wash
description:
Red Roof Car Wash in Ocean View, NJ offers touchless, brushless automated washing designed to protect your vehicle's paint while delivering a thorough clean. Located at 2518 Shore Rd, the facility operates 24/7, making it convenient to stop by whenever your schedule allows. The wash includes undercarriage cleaning to remove salt and debris that can damage your car's underside.

Beyond the automated wash, Red Roof provides self-serve bays for customers who prefer hands-on cleaning, plus complimentary vacuum stations and towels to finish the job. With a 3.5-star rating from 28 customer reviews, the business has established itself as a reliable choice for vehicle maintenance in the Ocean View area. Whether you need a quick wash or more detailed service, the combination of technology and amenities makes Red Roof a practical option for local drivers.

name: TigerWash - Dillwyn
description:
TigerWash in Dillwyn offers professional touchless automated car washing at 16042 N James Madison Hwy, with a 3.8-star rating from customers. The facility features four wash packages—Basic, Deluxe, Premium, and Ultimate—to match any budget and cleaning need. Their touchless system is gentle on your vehicle's paint while delivering thorough results, and every wash includes complimentary vacuuming service. For added convenience, TigerWash also offers ceramic coating services to protect and enhance your vehicle's finish.

Frequent visitors benefit from TigerWash's Unlimited Wash Club, Annual Wash Plans, and Family Plans, which provide significant savings compared to single washes. The Dillwyn location is open 24 hours on Wednesdays, making it easy to fit a car wash into your schedule. Beyond unlimited memberships, the business offers gift cards and a TigerWash Rewards program for additional value. If you prefer hands-on cleaning, self-serve bays are available for those who want to wash their own vehicles.

name: Wash World Car Wash
description:
Wash World Car Wash in Tulsa, OK offers 24/7 touchless automated car washing at 10410 E 41st St, designed to keep your vehicle safe from scratches and damage. The facility features a touchless car wash system paired with free vacuums for all customers, plus self-serve bays for those who prefer a hands-on approach. With a 4.6-star rating from 40 customer reviews, Wash World stands out for its commitment to quality and customer satisfaction, backed by a 100% satisfaction guarantee with no-hassle refunds.

Members can take advantage of the Monthly Wash Club for unlimited access to all services at a discounted rate, making regular car maintenance more affordable. The membership program is ideal for drivers looking to protect their vehicle's finish while saving time and money on routine cleaning. Whether you need a quick wash or want to join the club for regular maintenance, Wash World Car Wash is open around the clock to serve your needs.

name: American Pride Xpress Car Wash
description:
American Pride Xpress Car Wash in Smithfield, NC is located at 1203 N. Brightleaf Boulevard and operates as a tunnel car wash facility offering both express washes and unlimited membership options. The facility features state-of-the-art technology and provides multiple wash packages including services like ceramic armor coating, rain repellant, wax application, wheel and tire cleaning, tire shine, and underbody rinse. All tunnel wash packages include complimentary amenities such as mat cleaning (completed in 30 seconds), streak-free glass cleaning, soft towels, high-pressure detailing air for hard-to-reach areas, and free self-serve vacuums with curved claw and crevice tools.

The location is open daily from 7:30 AM to 8:00 PM, seven days a week. American Pride emphasizes their Unlimited Wash Club membership as a primary offering, allowing customers to wash their car daily for one low monthly fee with no long-term commitments and automatic license plate recognition for convenient entry. The company promotes a customer-friendly experience where patrons remain in their vehicle throughout the automated wash and drying process. Specific pricing for individual wash packages was not detailed on the website, but the facility positions itself as offering high-quality washes at affordable prices.

name: The Car Wash at Faxon
description:
The Car Wash at Faxon in Williamsport, PA offers fast, convenient vehicle cleaning with state-of-the-art soft touch wash technology that completes most washes in approximately 90 seconds. Located at 18 Liberty Lane, this touchless automated car wash is rated 4.0 stars by over 230 customers who praise its quick service, affordable pricing, and consistent results. The facility features unlimited free vacuum access after every wash—a particularly popular feature for maintaining black cars during winter months.

The Car Wash at Faxon provides flexible pricing options to fit any budget, with the Unlimited Wash Club starting at just $19.95 per month, pay-per-wash options, and pre-paid bundle deals available. Beyond standard car washes, the location accommodates RV and oversized vehicles, offers tire shine services, and provides dedicated hand-wash bays. Fleet packages are available for business customers with multiple vehicles.

Open seven days a week from 8 AM to 6 PM (extended hours until 7 PM Thursday through Saturday), The Car Wash at Faxon makes it easy to maintain your vehicle on your schedule. With mobile pay available and self-serve options alongside the automated system, customers can choose the service level that works best for them. Whether you're looking for a monthly unlimited membership or occasional spot cleaning, this Williamsport car wash delivers reliable, inexpensive vehicle care.

name: Splash n Dash Car Wash & Detailing
description:
Splash N Dash is a full-service car wash located in the Short Pump area of Henrico, VA (9940 Mayland Drive) that operates 24/7 with a comprehensive range of washing and detailing services. The facility features two automated service bays—including a touchless in-bay option with no tracks or chains that accommodates large vehicles like dually trucks, and a soft touch Autec machine with a mitter curtain—alongside five self-serve wash bays and ten vacuum stations (quarters only, $1 for 4 minutes). Automated wash pricing ranges from $10 for a Deluxe Wash to $20 for a Supreme Ceramic Wash, with options featuring undercarriage washing, foam treatments, ceramic finishes, graphene coating, and spot-free rinse systems.

Beyond automated washes, Splash N Dash offers professional detailing packages during staffed hours, including their most popular "Best Wash in Town" service starting at $55 for sedans ($65 for SUVs), which includes pre-scrub, shammy dry, tire shine, and interior vacuuming. Additional detail tiers include Express Wash ($85-$105), Hand Wash and Wax ($105-$125), Interior Detail ($200-$225), and Exterior Detail services. The business also provides innovative membership plans with pickup and delivery service, fleet cards for corporate accounts, gift certificates, and an optional Rain Insurance add-on ($2) that provides complimentary replacement washes if significant rain occurs within 48 hours of purchase.

name: 5 Star Auto Wash

name: Kirkland Premier Car Wash
description:
Kirkland Premier Car Wash in Camas, WA operates a touchless, brushless automated system with self-serve bays available 24/7 from 3 AM to midnight daily. The facility uses spot-free rinse technology and touchless air dry to finish vehicles without brushes or contact. Three tiered packages are available: the Deluxe Wash tackles dirt, grime, and road film; the Ultimate Wash adds sealers and coatings for long-lasting shine and durability; and the Premier Wash delivers a luxurious clean with all available options. Beyond the standard packages, Kirkland Premier Car Wash offers ceramic coating, undercarriage washing, wax service, and an unlimited wash club membership option.

The business distinguishes itself by allowing customers to bundle any combination of wash packages at discounted prices. For those who prefer hands-on cleaning, self-serve bays are available. The Camas location at 1829 SE 192nd Ave is part of Kirkland Premier Car Wash's network of multiple locations across the Pacific Northwest. Current customer reviews average 1.8 stars based on 79 ratings, reflecting varied experiences worth reviewing before your visit.

Call Kirkland Premier Car Wash during operating hours—open every day from 3 AM to midnight—or check their website for membership details and current package pricing.
